title: Evil Lives Inside (boyxboy)
description:
A collection of short boyxboy stories I wrote  involving male pregnancy, scary tales with twists and turns coming from my weird imagination. 

Evil Lives Inside
"Well the story goes...At the tender age of six he began wandering out into the woods near by and dissecting small animals to see what was inside. He craved the sight of blood, the taste of it. The older he became the more he dreamt of committing the perfect crime by painting the walls red covered in blood. Torture and harm towards everyone who belittled him into nothing or even looked at him as if he was a freak of nature...."

Sick Twisted Love
He causes my nightmares. He gives them to me and never makes them go away. He brought me into his world full of despair and pain. I can't leave. I can never leave because he won't let me. He says he went through a lot of planning, waiting for the perfect person to come along. He didn't pick me at random walking home on a dark school night by myself.

authorBio:
I love reading and writing more than anything. Most of the stories I write and post on wattpad are boyxboy stories and contain male pregnancy... I'd really love to write a book with someone on wattpad. Maybe one day..

I want to say thank you to everyone who has followed me or voted and commented for any of my stories I post here. Especially The Gift which took what felt like forever to finish. You stuck by and enjoyed it even though I doubted it every time I pressed the publish button.

I never imagined so many people would ever enjoy anything to come from me. It means a lot to me. The book started from a dream and went from  there. Good news is I'm writing book two Rebuild, Repair, Then Comes Revenge slowly right now in three parts as I finish a few other stories I placed on hold. I'm excited and happy because I have so many plans and ideas that I can't wait for everyone to read it.

Um.. in other news Fulls Bloods is still on hold and the other stories I promised to start posting like The Nightmare Continues which I plan to get back to posting new chapters since I took it down months ago along with a few other stories. But I think I'm going to edit them and change a lot of things. I have a lot of stories half completed I want to finish and post. Hopefully I will soon.

Anyway I hope everyone enjoys my stories.  :)

When she meets a bad boy half-breed demon guy will he be able to stop the visions or will he only pull her into a darker world of ritual, forgotten pasts and secret destinies?

title: The Devil's Daughter
description:
Highest Rank: #7 in Mystery/Thriller
cover by @TheMizer

Faith is perfect in the sense that her appearance is flawless. She's a walking doll with the perfect body, skin, hair, eyes, lips, etc. 
She's a born killing machine and has been trained in every martial art there is. She hides behind her mask of perfection to keep her sanity.
When Hades, her father, sends her to the human world as a lesser demon to learn about the humans before she takes over as the Devil, she tries to suppress her murderous urges, but how long could she possibly last? 
How long until someone figures out what she is? 
How long before her insanity catches up to her? 
And who's going to stop her when it does?

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is a side story I'll be working on and there is no official schedule. 
This book is purely to get my writer's block out of the way but I in no way slacked off in the process. 
I hope you guys enjoy it!

authorBio:
I'm 21, and I'm a college junior.  Officially Retired from Wattpad as of August 2017 with occasional updates but absolutely no promises.
If you wanna keep up, follow my isntagram @sixxstreams or watch me on twitch.tv/sixxstreams
My books are usually action packed because I feel bored without it.

By what's a love story without danger in it?
The girl has to save the guy from something after all.

I call myself Alice, because I believe books are our Wonderland. I believe that whenever we open a book and flip through that first page we are opening the door to another world, where anything and everything is real. I hope I can give you a world you would like to get lost in.

Favorite Quote: "The belief in a supernatural source of evil is not necessary.  Men alone is quite capable of every wickedness." ~Joseph Conrad

I love Suits, Supernatural, teen wolf, the originals, vampire diaries, Doctor Who, Lucifer, and Criminal Minds and all sorts of Anime

All my stories are now discontinued due to me wanting to have them finished and published professionally as an occupation rather than a hobby. Please understand this website helped me discover what I wanted in life, and helped me discover my future. I'm now chasing after the future my readers have carved for me. title: Life in Paintings
description:
"I must have hit my head a lot harder than I had anticipated, or maybe breathe too much smoke because this is definitely nut-case crazy. Or a very creepy dream that feels way too real for my own good. I can pat my subconscious on the back for that one, but at the same time, it might be a little over the top."
When Melody set fire to a museum she didn't expect to hit her head on the pavement and wake up in a nightmare. But she does. And this nightmare is not a nightmare apparently--it's a curse.
A curse that traps her into paintings. And there's no escaping from the wrath of a possessed painting out to teach an art-hater a lesson.


Cover painting made by Soo Kim (http://sookimstudio.com/blog/)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Depending on what you believe in I might be a gooey alien living underground in my big tank with internet for only means of communication with the outer world. I could also be a giant zombie dragon. Or a shrimp, but only on Wednesday. 
Or I could be a thirty-one year old girl, getting her master's degree in English literature (cuz I want people to call me Master), using Karianne Giard as her pen name (Giard is my mother's maiden name because my real last name is French and often unpronounceable if you aren't French), with French as her first language, that absolutely loves to read and write but has an hectic life so doesn't upload as often as she used to.
I'm from that specie that thinks they're always right and own everything and if anything or anyone disagrees we'll destroy them and pee on their ashes. Claude Gauvreau is a big inspiration, I mean, when I'm on acid. I don't think the Earth is in danger, I think the humans are. And I don't always make sense 'cause like Augustus Waters, "my thoughts are stars I can't fathom into constellations."

_________

WRITING SCHEDULE:

Monday: Little Bitch
____________


I don't take reading requests--I just don't have the time. 
And I don't accept translation offers--my stories are unedited and it could hurt my chances of getting published. 

DFTBA

title: On Earth's Altar
description:
The discovery of a prehistoric body sets in motion a cataclysmic chain of events long foretold by ancient prophecy . . . .

Still grieving his mother's death, Seattle bachelor Peter Barshman receives a cryptic message from his estranged father. As he ponders its meaning, he is approached by Nechama Davila, a young Israeli archaeologist who believes Peter and his father harbor information about a stolen artifact of immense importance. But she's not the only one zeroing in on Peter. When assassins strike, the two of them are thrust into a deadly game of cat and mouse where the only hope for survival is finding the artifact before the killers find them.  

Tinkering away in his basement laboratory, former CDC virologist R. K. Brisling receives an urgent phone call. The vice president of the United States is dead, and Congress wants to know why. Dragged out of semi-retirement to investigate, Brisling returns to the CDC in Atlanta, where he confronts his tragic past and a looming viral outbreak beyond his wildest fears. When Brisling traces the outbreak to its unlikely source, he uncovers an astonishing link between the virus, the artifact and the ancient prophecy--a link that could shape the future of human civilization. 

_____________________________

Here's what others are saying about ON EARTH'S ALTAR:

"... This is definitely one of the best books I've ever read on WP!" -- @linahanson, Wattpad Ambassador

"Intelligent, mysterious, beautifully written ..." -- @Megerah111

"Very Dan Brown like ...  I've read all of his novels.  For storytelling, attention to research, and writing style, I'd put [@Frode92's] writing on par with his." -- @elmerseward

title: Why Did You Do It?
description:
Jared Shay and Angela Nicolson were the best of friends when they were younger. Their parents were best friends and paired them up together the moment Angela was born. Even thought the two of them were polar opposites~ Jared is a handsome popular strapping young man while Angie is a frizzy haired crooked teeth visitor~ they are each other's best friend. There is only one problem and neither of them are willing to talk about it. One earth shattering disaster prevents Angie from coming back to visit that Shay family. That is until 9 years later when Angie is forced to go back. She realizes quickly that things may never be the same again. Jared is a completely different person. When will things start getting back to normal between the two of them? Why is Jared acting so strange? And most important, what happened that fateful day that neither of them like to talk about?
Find out in my new story XD
VOTE VOTE VOTE! Thank you<333

title: I fought zombies in ancient times
description:
Yu Linyuan was a good young man born in the first year of the apocalypse. He lived to the age of 18. Once when he was collecting supplies outside, he encountered a zombie tide, and the car he was driving ran out of gas, so after his death he traveled to the ancient times that were only depicted in the apocalyptic museum. Although there are no electronic devices in the apocalypse, he can finally live a comfortable life with a blue sky and delicious food. It's wonderful to think about it! However, what Yu Linyuan didn't expect was that since he could travel here, the zombie virus could also be. Yu Linyuan looked at his superpowers, not only did he become stronger, but he continued to fight zombies! CP: Yu Linyuan (top) × Chu Ci (bottom) [The sequel to "I opened a Taoist temple in ancient times", please pre-collect~] Liu Yichi inherited his family's dilapidated 
Taoist temple. He failed the postgraduate entrance examination and was preparing for the second exam. He was attracted by the tranquility of the Taoist temple. Unexpectedly, not long after he moved in, the Taoist temple collapsed due to disrepair. Liu Yichi traveled to thousands of years ago and saw the man who had enjoyed the incense of his family's ancestral Taoist temple for thousands of years! ! ! What should I do if I have a crush on the person I have been worshipping? Waiting online, urgent! Li Su has recovered his memory. He died once. Later, because of one person, he died many times again. He saw the person who made him live and die again. This time, he decided that he would take revenge. How many ways are there to take revenge on your enemies? Waiting online, urgent! title: Rise of the Phoenix - Apocalypse Rebirth
description:
Aria was poisoned by her loved ones and turned into a zombie. Ironically she still maintained her consciousness. While watching a group of survivors escape, she accidentally acquired a system who gave her the choice to escape the Zombie King or to kill him. Although Aria never had any aspirations to save humanity, she decided to kill him.

Then she woke up well over 2  years before the zombie apocalypse happened and convinced the 3 systems siblings to bind with her for a higher chance of survival. The three systems' goal is to help their hosts survive for 6 years. 

Aria then spent over 2.5 years training her body and abilities, grabbing treasures, eating good food, and gathering resources. Pretending to be a prophet, she anonymously helped humanity prepare for survival despite all the hidden dangers that brought her. 

As for all the people that wronged her in the previous life, of course she must make them pay in this life. 
-
This is a story about a girl who was wronged in the previous life and was used as an experimental object who traveled back in time with the help of a few systems and a mech suit just trying to stay low key and survive for 6 years after the zombie apocalypse.
-
First chapter publish: 07/14/2020
Warning: The Zombie Apocalypse doesn't happen until Part 3
-
Part 1: Before the ZA (2.5 years)
Chapter 1 - Chapter 50 (Preparations)
Part 2: The Deep Freeze
Chapter 51+ (Deep Freeze)
Part 3: The Zombie Apocalypse

title: Shifting Truth
description:
Shinichi always followed Sherlock Holmes' words; "When you have eliminated the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth." And those words were always there for him. Even during times he didn't want them to.

There had been many times he wished the truth wasn't as it was, but as a detective, he knew better than that.

He thought his reality had been picked apart enough when he shrunk because of a drug from a dangerous criminal organisation, but he was proven wrong yet again...

And the only thing he could do was to accept the truth the world was giving him.
*********

title: A Stalker's Passion
description:
"CHARLIE!" His screams were getting closer until I saw him completely. 
I grabbed the knife and pointed it straight at him.
"Get away from me!" I say warning him
His face was red and he still stalked towards me slowly.
"GET AWAY FROM ME!" I yell fearing the fact that didn't look scared at all.
"Put the knife down."
I started to back up a bit still pointing the knife at him.
"I'm not telling you again, put it down NOW!" His calm persona was instantly replaced with a furious one. 
"Please Tho-" He came charging straight at me but I made a run for it. I ran as fast as I could with him behind me until he tackled me to the floor. The knife flew across the hallway and he was on top of me. 
"Thomas please let me go. I don't want to be here. Please." I say begging
"You're ruining everything. It was so perfect and special just for you and you're ruining it." I can tell he was sad but more pissed off this anything.
"WHY ARE YOU DOING THIS TO ME?! I LOVE YOU MORE THAN ANYTHING AND THIS IS HOW YOU REPAY ME!"  He screamed in my face.
"I-" 
"SHUT YOUR DAMN MOUTH!" He roars slapping me across the face.
He roughly picks me up and drags me to the room. He yanked me away from him making me fall hit my knee on the hard wood floor. He walked in the bathroom to get something and I realized it something to put me to sleep. He poured the chemical into the towel as he mumbled to himself and I watched in fear. He pulled me from the ground and tried to make me breathe in. I fought the urge to. I thrashed back and forth trying to get free but nothing worked. Slowly, my vision got blurry and  felt darkness overtake me.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Doctor
description:
Captured by two thugs, Albina Ratownik is held captive in an underground "hospital"that's buried twenty feet deep. She is in Dr. Smok's grip and is forced to undergo a painful psychological experiment. She is not the only victim here, there are many other "patients" that work as slaves, get their organs sold illegally, and are beaten in this so-called "hospital". The underground hospital is guarded by black-armored guards and is near impossible to escape. Not only does Dr. Smok torture his patients and watch them suffer but he takes pleasure in doing it. 

According to Dr. Smok,  Albina is special. She has a life that is similar to Smok's past which is why she was chosen for the psychological experiment. This experiment leave her alive with a mental scar or dead in the doctor's arms. Although escape is a death wish, Albina does find a chance of escape.  With the help of two twins she will help free every single patient in this hospital. But Smok is intelligent and can predict everyone's moves so will she escape or die trying?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Possessed
description:
Devon Barnes and her best friend, Dante Granger, have just finished University and move into the third story flat in a gorgeous, newly renovated town house. The excitement of her first place soon wears off for Devon as she notices some strange things happening in the flat. 

Dante brushes it off as stress from the move and Devon’s new job, so she finds herself trying to work out what is happening alone. With only a two initials scribbled on a piece of paper, she sets out to find who ZJ and SM are. 
None of the neighbours seem to want to discuss the previous tenants, but when Devon overhears them gossiping about ‘poor Spencer Morgan’ she is halfway to discovering what is going on.

Things take an unexpected turn as Dante starts to notice Devon acting out of character, and he is forced to face the truth – something out of the ordinary really is going on.

title: The Egg at Dumstreet
description:
[Completed] A U.S. expatriate is cast into a rainy, foggy corner of Europe. He went there on the pretense to work on his research, but he actually wanted to put as many miles as possible between himself and his ex.
  
The university he works for has found him an apartment in a house inhabited by a set of strange characters. 
  
The mess begins with a broken egg.
  
And it continues with his neighbor being murdered.
  
    
  
    
 A story somewhere between general fiction, mystery, gossip, romance, and humor.

First place in Mystery/Thrillers in the Blank Sheets Contest over at @Blank_Sheets .

title: Ghost Sweepers The XXX that only I can understand
description:
Salutation! I'm Arlo Madder who is a storyteller who travel between worlds and worlds to tell tales of the unknown. I have came to Earth to fulfill my wish to tell stories. It is my greatest pleasure to meet all of you.
The story in this website illustrates a young boy named Alfie Rivas, who has the ability to see ghosts. Because of this talent, he suffers from a tragic life of being bullied at school and experiencing domestic violence at home. Despite the fact that he encounters difficulty in living, his friend Jay was always there to comfort him and stand by his side. However, due to his bad luck, supernatural things start to appear in his school. Broken windows, lights turning on and off and creepy black hands. These things create terror and panic to every student, teachers and staff in Sacred Diamond primary and secondary school. Alfie and Jay even got suspected as being the master criminal of causing these events by a strong ghost sweeper. Can Alfie and Jay prove their innocence, defeat the ghost sweeper and discover the true ghost who is behind the scenes? Look at this Book immediately and hear the answers.

title: Nightmares of Caitlin Lockyer
description:
Six months ago, Nathan's sister was brutally murdered.
Now the former playboy desires only one thing: revenge. 
Late at night, Nathan trudges down the beach where his sister's body was found. He's searching for answers, but all he finds is a new nightmare: another girl's tortured body. 
Only this one isn't dead . . . yet. 
The unlikely hero becomes the prime suspect. Saving Caitlin's life was just the start. Nathan must win her trust and unlock the memories hidden in her nightmares to find out who's really responsible . . .before it's too late. 

A tiny taste of what's in store:

"Stay away from her, Nathan. That girl isn't good for you."
Stay away from her? I'd go crazy with worry in a day. "You don't know her."
Chris looked grim. "Neither do you. Is there anything you wouldn't do for her?" 
"Yes," I snapped. "I wouldn't die for her."
Chris turned around to stare at me, her mouth hanging open. 
"Do you want to know why?" I asked steadily. "I wouldn't die for her because I wouldn't be able to protect her any more. What if I missed one of the people who hurt her? I couldn't take that risk. She's too important." 
* * * * * * * * * * 

Now an Amazon Top 100 Bestseller, Nightmares of Caitlin Lockyer is available from Amazon, B&N, Apple, Diesel, Kobo and Smashwords. As is the sequel, Necessary Evil of Nathan Miller and the final book in the trilogy, Afterlife of Alanna Miller.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Demelza Carlton has always loved the ocean, but on her first snorkelling trip she found she was afraid of fish.

She has since swum with sea lions, sharks and sea cucumbers. She's stood on spray-drenched cliffs over a seething sea as a seven-metre cyclonic swell surged in, shattering a shipwreck below.

Sensationalist spin? Hardly. She takes a camera with her to capture shots just like her background picture and loads them on her blog: http://www.demelzacarlton.com

Demelza lives in Perth, Western Australia, the shark attack capital of the world.

The Ocean's Gift series was her first foray into fiction, followed by the Nightmares trilogy. She swears the Mel Goes to Hell series ambushed her on a crowded train and wouldn't leave her alone.

title: To Be A Survivor
description:
Book #2 in the To Be A Runner series. If you haven't read book #1 I suggest you do that before continuing.

Highest ranking #84 in Mystery/Thriller


A blown up Township, one sworn enemy, a huge annoying crush, still no name, and a chance to speak again.

Yep, that sounds about-wait, what? 


Abel is gone, the Major is back, and now we all have teamed up in trying to defeat the main enemy-the man who somehow knows how to make zombies blow up a township: Professor Van Ark.

We know he's got something going on, but what we know is just the tip of the iceberg. He's the reason the apocalypse began. He's the reason Abel Township is gone. He's the reason Maxine isn't with Paula. 

I'm going to stop at nothing to stop him and whatever it is he's planning. I will stop at nothing to find out answers, but there's one thing I have to remember...

Not all of us will make it out alive, and not all of us will make it out... unharmed.

New friends, traitors, deaths, experimentations-all of it. It's all something I'm going to have to face, and I can only hope that I'll be able to survive it.






Disclaimer: I do not own zombies run, or its characters. The only characters I own are the ones I've created. This is my Runner Five's view of season two with some things I like to imagine happened in between missions.

title: To Be A Killer
description:
Book 3 in the in To Be A Runner series. If you have not read books 1 and 2, I seriously suggest you do that before continuing or you will be really confused.



Missing friends, a new enemy, a secretive company, and many new discoveries.

Yep, that sounds about right.

It's been four months since some of the Abel residents left our walls, and in our search, we've been fruitless.

Until now.

With the help of a new friend, we discover more about Diana and Comansys, and what's happened to our people. That's the main priority-finding our friends, finding Maxine, finding Caleb. 

Turns out there's a lot more about the apocalypse and how it started. There's more than we could have ever imagined. Each new clue leads to another story-another piece of the puzzle. I can only hope we figure it out before it's too late.

Because there are bad people out there, and sometimes we have to play by their rules instead of our own. And I'm merely a pawn in this game of chess-a pawn that every player of the game wants to either kill or own.

New friends, old friends, new discoveries, and pain. So much pain. And yet... so much joy. So much joy doing the things I never thought I'd do...

And I can't help but hate myself for feeling so good about doing such horrible things.








Disclaimer-I do not own Zombies, Run! Or it's characters. I only own the ones I created. This is my Runner Five's version of season three and what I think happened in between missions.

title: Apocalypse
description:
'I turned around and saw a creeper standing directly behind me, tilting his head to take a bite of my neck.
It's breath was putrid, their crooked teeth stained orange from the feeding of animals.
I grabbed my knife out of my boot and sliced it's throat.
It stumbled back and came at me again.
I poised the knife in my hand and forced it into its bloodshot eye.
Blood pooled out of its socket as it fell to the ground.'

Arizona is living in a world of ruin and wreckage in the wake of a zombie apocalypse. It seems there is no hope for having a normal family someday. People she loves are dying left and right and she doesn't know what to do as they are consumed by the virus. Until her life turns around for the better when she encounters somebody in the forest. The world crumbles down around her, will she ever come out of the rubble alive? And with the ones she loves?

title: -Accomplice- Kurt Kunkle x reader
description:
"What do you do when streaming? if you don't mind me asking." 

I ask to fill the silence in the car. 

"I kill people"

I blink and swallow, hard. 

"Pardon?"

"I stream people in my car! You know when I give them rides."

That is not what he said. I start to sweat. 

He stopped the car and turned around. 

"Thats very nice." I tried my best to act normal. 

"You heard what I said at first, didn't you?"

I shook my head. 

"Don't lie to me y/n"

His tone sent shivers up my spine. 

"I did..."

His eyes softened. 

"I hope your alright with you because if it isn't. This isn't gonna end well for you."

"Im totally fine with that!"

I smile. I am not dying today. Nope. 



-----

A/n: There it is! Chapter one! I went back through and changed a lot of the things I didn't like. There's a lot more I changed, but I want to keep it true to the story as to not confuse you guys.

title: Necrocide
description:
This is not your average zombie story. This isn't the beginning of an outbreak. There's no group of survivors trying to find a supposed sanctuary. And worst of all, there is no cure.

Just a young man counting down how long he has until he turns.

But as infected ex-zombie killer Aaron O'Connor slowly loses his humanity, he learns he can communicate with the hordes of the undead known as Deadmen. With the help of a few sentient zombies, Aaron begins uncovering the dark secrets of his safe haven along with the origins of the Deadmen and their violent, super-powered leader.

Can he expose the truth before succumbing to his bloodlust?

(Credit to @books1524 for the cover. Be sure to check them out!!)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
- NO PROMOTING STORIES ON MY MESSAGE BOARD OR IN MY OWN STORIES. PM ME IF YOU WANT ME TO CHECK SOMETHING OUT (Although I'll only check it out if it genuinely intrigues me) -

MY STORIES:
- NECROCIDE (COMPLETE): a sci-fi horror zombie apocalypse story with tons of gore and a touch of dark humor
- COGNITIVE DEVIANCE (COMPLETE): a cyberpunk psychological thriller with plenty of action, twists, and social commentary
- BRIGHT LIGHTS & DARK SECRETS (ONGOING): An ongoing Black Mirror-esque collection of 6 science fiction short stories with the violence of Necrocide, the twists and thrills of Cognitive Deviance, and the intriguing characters of both!

ABOUT MYSELF:
* Former Wattpad Star, current writer's block victim
* I'm your guy if you like sci-fi! My specialty is the cyberpunk genre (I still remember when typing that here on Wattpad WOULDN'T flood your feed with 2077 and Edgerunners fanfics)
* Before May 2023, college was my excuse for my unpredictable upload schedule. Now, it's the existential crisis of deciding where to go now that I've graduated. And also me dabbling in screenwriting on the side.
* All of the stories published here are the very first drafts, as entertaining and comprehensible as they may be. If some aspects of the story (grammar, spelling, plot consistency) appear like they could be better, that is because they most DEFINITELY can be better. Feel free to comment on these things!!
* I love movies! A little too much! I really should read more, especially as an author. But if you need a movie rec, I got your back! My faves are sci-fi, superhero, action, and anything psychological or Disney.

SOMEDAY I will feel sane and satisfied. Not anytime soon but probably someday.

"I'm not going to kill you darling, I'm keeping you.." He ran his hand down to my hip.

* * * * * *

title: Shadow In Your Mind [ARC 1- 5]
description:
All Wong Xue Guo ever wanted was her parent's attention on her. She had done all that she could do to get it, only for her attempts to be futile. Just when she was about to give up and just embrace the world of fiction to fill her heart, her mother suddenly changed a hundred and eighty degrees and acted like an affectionate mother that calls her 'baby'.

The change happened around the same time as the zombie outbreak at a shopping mall. That mall coincidentally was also the place for Wong Xue Guo's high school graduation party with her classmates.

Although happy to be showered with love and concern by her previously indifferent mother, Wong Xue Guo could not turn a blind eye to the hints of her mother's strangeness.

Why would her mother tell her to hide right before the zombie outbreak?

Why would her father know the zombie's weak point?

And who can tell her why her housewife mother could kill zombies with kitchen knives with ease?!

She was crazy.

title: Forever Till death...
description:
"I love you" Jason said his eyes lighting up with that crazy and twisted smile that I had grown to loathe.
"N-no you don't"
"First you tell me to stay away from you, now you tell me how to feel!" He shouted as he came closer to me while I began to walk backwards. I mustered up all my courage as my back hit the wall leaving me with nowhere to run.
"That's because what you feel isn't love."
"Ha! " He said taking the final step bringing him to stand toe to toe with me. He lifted his hands and placed them on either side of my head on the wall. Then he lowered his head slowly and stared right into my eyes.
"See you don't get it do you?" He said in almost a whisper..
"We're going to spend the rest of our lives together whether you know it or not."
I shut my eyes unable to bear his intense look.
"Just wait and see":

title: Chairs
description:
"Okay, where do you want me to start?"  "Anywhere you wish."  "There were five of us. Dani, Elizabeth, Audrey, Taylor and me. We spent about 9 months in the basement. The walls where cement. The floor was cement. We each had our own chairs. Dani had her baby blue chair with white roses in the upper right corner. Elizabeth had her pale pink chair with white daiseys in the lower right corner. Audrey had her yellow chair with white roses in the upper left corner. Taylor had her black chair with red roses in the lower left corner. I had a white chair with sunflowers that sat in the center, the very center of the room. Each of us had a light above our heads. There were no covers in the lights just the wires losely hanging with the light attached at the end. The front legs of all our chairs had buckles that when we sat down they were right where our ankles were like he knew just were to put them. There were buckles on our arm rests that when we laid are arms on them the buckels our wrist were in the perfect spot. I think its funny how we all never made the conecction."  "What conecction would that be?"  "That we all have brown hair, blue eyes, were 5'5, all weighed 130. That when you put the first letter of each of our names together it spells Death. I love how at one point we all thought something, right before we were taken. Dani thought she was going to get mail. Elizabeth thought she was picking up dinner. Audrey thought she was going to class. Taylor thought she was taking her dog for a walk and I thought I was going to marry him and that I loved him with all my heart."

title: The Devil's Son ✔
description:
Elizabeth de Baptiste never stood out much in school, she was a wallflower who blended into the vines that decorated Peril High. Just like all other girls in school she crushed on the school athlete; Jack Isle, the small-town jock star.

When Elizabeth one day stumbles into the Mythology section in the Library she finds a book per chance: the Grand Grimoire. Feeling drawn to the odd book she takes it home, finding that it contains spells, spells to make her get noticed by Jack Isle.

She could've never prepared herself for the next unfolding of events. She might've just accidentally and jokingly sold her soul to the Devil, literally. 

And his son is going to collect it. 

Most disturbingly, everything seems to point to Lucian Black, the school's rumoured bad boy, to be the man to do the deed. Is Lucian going after Elizabeth? And what will she do? 

Will he steal her soul, or her heart?

title: Crime and punishment by Fyodor Dostoyevsky
description:
Raskolnikov, a destitute and desperate former student, wanders through the slums of St Petersburg and commits a random murder without remorse or regret. He imagines himself to be a great man, a Napoleon: acting for a higher purpose beyond conventional moral law. But as he embarks on a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a suspicious police investigator, Raskolnikov is pursued by the growing voice of his conscience and finds the noose of his own guilt tightening around his neck. Only Sonya, a downtrodden sex worker, can offer the chance of redemption.

Goodreads reviews,

H.S. writes about The First 30 Days *****
Fantastic story! The author brings the zombie apocalypse to life. You feel as if you're really there and you're running for your life along side Bri.

Bri is a likeable character, as is Shawn but their relationship moves like snails. Slow and long. They both want to protect one another, but at the same time Bri will make stupid decisions based on her need to stay close to Shawn. Sweet, but in a zombie apocalypse, dangerous.

I love Rex. I'd like to think my furry babies would protect me during an zombie apocalypse (althrough I'm pretty sure my chihuahua would bark until eaten). So having a dog around is good, and also smart.

I liked the story when it was on Wattpad, and I'm glad she got the book published. I can't wait to add this to my collection! Likeable characters, a good story line and how she starts the whole thing is fantastic.

title: Running With Scissors
description:
Diagnosed with a terminal illness, Peter Katz hires a hitman to take him out. But when a cure is discovered, Peter's got to outrun the assassin to stay alive!

*****

When douchebag lawyer Peter Katz gets diagnosed with terminal cancer, he wants to die painlessly. Still, death seems to elude his every attempt, so he hires an assassin to kill him at a random time and place within the month. Unfortunately for Peter, right after he orders the hit, a treatment is discovered that would add decades to his life. Now Peter Katz has to start running, until the month-long deadline ends. Desperate to survive, he has to deal with tall-dwarves, unionized suicide workers, art terrorism and all the insanity that being alive has to offer. Will he make it to the end of the month? Or will Peter Katz live a life's worth of craziness in however many days he has left?

For what is Comedy, but Tragedy + Time?

[[word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]

title: To Be A Hero
description:
Book 4 in the To Be A Runner series. If you have not read books 1, 2 or 3, I seriously suggest you do before continuing in order to avoid confusion.


An expectant mother, a shady government worker, an unexpected visitor, and the search for a cure.

Yep, that sounds about right.

It's been almost nine months since the world was saved  from eternal happiness, but the world is still in danger. The dead still walk and we are still far from finding a cure.

But we are still discovering new things. Veronica's hard at work, and with Abel teaming up with the Ministry nothing should be able to stop us. At least, that's what I thought.

But there are things we still don't understand, things I'm not sure I want to understand, like the voices in my head, like the zombies that can almost talk and are what Veronica likes to call 'Sentient Type Zombies'. There are things that I'm facing that I'd rather just forget-things I'd rather not know about...

But I can't be that way. I can't back down-not from the A.M.T.B., not from the voices in my head, and not from the overwhelming feelings that clog my throat and make it almost impossible to breathe whenever I see-

No, feelings are not important now, not when a cure is available, not when he's busy worrying about his baby that's due to arrive and the fact that Paula's getting sicker and...

I'm getting off topic.

It's time for me to step up once again. My job as a runner is never done. Now it's time for me to step up and be a hero.








Disclaimer-I do not own Zombies, Run! Or its characters. I only own the ones I created. This is my Runner Five's version of season four and what I think happened in between missions.

title: The Emperor Legacy
description:
After years of clashing among the European crime families, the De'Angelos find the Corcelli armoury -a hideout of fatal weapons and treasures which help them become Victor, marking the end of a millennial bloodshed and the beginning of their supremacy over all territories. A new rule regimes under the Italians for decades but things go wrong during the seventh. 

         Three royal children of the Seventh Mafia king, Niklaus, Enrico, and Naya face a tragic separation following a horrific attack at their main estate, while the youngest ones elope to a safer country and live undercover, the eldest struggles to earn back their position. 

          It's in the thrilling entails that the trio faces trouble navigating through romance, betrayal, heartbreak and a pile of tragedy. Will the siblings bare the consequences of their own family's legacy? Or will they scurry from the darkness of the reeking havoc.?
   
           *Updated 2 chapters, every Saturday and Sunday, and if lucky during the week*

title: No Journey Too Small (G/T)
description:
It was supposed to 'fix' me. Cure anyone else who was like me.

'Fix' apparently has quite different definitions from different perspectives. And when it comes to the perspective of Amy Edwards, you will find the differences to be crystal clear.

From the top, Amy is quite normal, as expected from any 16 year old.
Except for the fact that she is quite small for her age. A little over 3 inches tall. And that's how it is.

After a tragic incident, a cousin comes to live with them. The apprehensive Amy found this specific cousin quirky and understanding, for good reason. That's because despite being taller than Amy, Nick Edwards is no more than 3 and a half inches tall.

But 'giving up' is something unknown to the Edwards family.
Despite their problems, they deal with it. Together, with friends and family.
For there is No Journey Too Small.

title: Split [ONC 2024]
description:
After one of the most awful days in her life, Eva Romney goes for a relaxing run on the trail behind her house. 

Cursing her failing life and her toxic boss, she fails to notice the clouds gathering above her. That is until she gets struck by lightning.

Overcome by her luck to still be alive after the shock, she leaves her toxic thoughts behind, finishes her run, and then returns home, as always.

The next morning, she is the calmest she's ever been. Surviving has turned her recent sulkiness into the purest happiness, and everything seems to be going right for once in her life.

At least until she finds the windshield of her car covered in blood. Struggling to remember whether she had anything to do with it, she starts down a path in which reality is twisted.

Soon after, people begin to disappear, and everyone claims she is to blame. 

As Eva struggles to find the truth, all clues lead to one conclusion.

Everyone could be right.

She might be the guilty party.

💀💀💀

Nope, this is definitely not me jumping on the ONC hype train.

Come to the OMC side. We have mangoes.

No, that is not a typo #ifyouknowyouknow

title: The Cure (Book One of The Golden Eyes Trilogy)
description:
Nova is a badass. 

She's not only a talented zombie slayer-she's tough, ruthless, and a downright bitch. But she loves who she is, and she wouldn't change herself for the world. 

Trying to survive the apocalypse with her best friend until they make it to Australia-the last safe place on Earth-is their only goal. 

Nova knows they can make it now that she has enhanced speed and strength and dramatically improved senses after dying from a bite and coming back to life as an immune superhuman. 

She just needs the Fates to send someone who can sail or fly them to their destination. 

And then the Fates do send someone. 

Along with a man named Finn. 

She can't help but to like him and for the crazy world they live in he makes her feel-well-normal. 

The plan is to get to Australia. It's the last safe place in the world and Nova truly believes she is the cure that will save the human race. 

But they have to go through Savages out for blood, new and different types of Zombies, an insane man and his army, and a three month boat ride to the safe lands. 

Hopefully they make it all in one piece. 

Read on to find out if they do.
Tous Droits Réservés

description:

title: BEAUTIFUL MONSTER
description:
"It was then my mother was set on fire." 

When Beatrice stumbles upon a crazed man in the forest she barely gets away with her life. Unable to convince anyone of his presence, she tries not to go anywhere near him again but that seems impossible when unfortunate situations arise and feelings change.

Her life had always been relatively normal until she met him but she never thought it'd take a holiday to Crazy Town like it did. As the murder count piles high, and the supernatural creatures take residence in her small, quaint town, she must fight for what she believes is right while trying not to lose her mind over everyone's lies and deception. 

Believing to be on top of the game, she's in for a shock as she realises she must give up those most precious to her or risk endangering Earth to those with greed on their mind and blood on their hands. 

HUMOUR | ACTION | ROMANCE | PARANORMAL | FANTASY |

authorBio:
Hi, I'm Peach (she/her). I write young adult romance, but I also have stories exploring other genres. Check out my stories in my reading list, which I already categorized based on genre, length, and language. I also made a separate reading list for stories that are a part of a series. title: Justice Arc 1 : Dragon Fist
description:
The story of a young boy named Mikado, who has lost his memory after a terrible tragedy befell him.

Although he tried many times to remember it again, but his efforts failed because the memory was so tightly locked that he almost lost his identity.

He was raised by an 89-year-old grandmother named Ashiro Grandma since he was 5 years old. With his memory gone and his background unknown, Mikado tries to forget his original goals in order to achieve his desired goal.

But....

He, came uninvited. And entered a school he never imagined as long as he was still breathing. Exiled, slandered, tortured, insulted and ostracized. Until he wished that this was all a nightmare so that he could wake up from it.

"I never thought that this was reality. Please, wake me up from this nightmare...." MIKADO

Mikado also continues to face 'hell' without stopping. Until a character appears that makes him scared half to death and wants to go back to his original place and just disappear.

"Why are you still here? I really don't like you being in my school! Get out of here or you will feel 'hell' here forever!" RAIDEN MATSUO

Ah..... Can I last until this year's school graduation ceremony?

Hell with this zombies? Hell with this weird people following him!(?) Hell with this romance novel that soon changed into a modern apocalypse!!!

title: OTHERS (Formerly The Scarlet Effect)
description:
The pandemic was just the beginning.
      
After an unknown virus sweeps across the globe, Aurora and two other survivors seek out safety in a bomb shelter with enough supplies to last a few years. Just as she starts to adapt to her new way of life, she is suddenly abducted by those responsible for introducing the disease, and is taken farther from home than she's ever been before.
      
She doesn't know what they want from her, but she soon discovers the truth: about her captors, the universe, and who she really is--a reality that leaves her breathless.
      
B O O K / 1
Previously Titled The Scarlet Effect

title: Just a Taste (SAMPLE)
description:
April Mansten: nineteen years old, blonde, beautiful... and also daughter to Mario Mansten, a renowned bounty hunter, and as badass as they come in the bounty hunting world.

Kellan Reed: twenty-three years old, dark, dangerous, and deadly... at least according to some. April's always thought of him as a complete and utter jackass. He's come far in the few years he's been bounty hunting thanks to Mario, the only father figure he's ever really known. 

The two are polar opposites when it comes to their upbringing. April having grown up in a loving and caring home, until tragedy breaks it apart. And Kellan, who has been through foster home after foster home, the only stability he's ever experienced coming through the Manstens and the kindness they extended towards a troubled teenager. Mario was great to him; first as an adviser while he was in school, and later as a mentor as he eagerly embraced the bounty hunting world. 

This is their story, one which is filled with deplorable betrayal, unspeakable heartache, and a fragile truce that blossoms into... love?

title: Vanished
description:
Aurora's life is the picture of perfection: a loving fiancé, a beautiful apartment, and a wedding just weeks away. But when she catches her fiancé, Jaden, in a devastating betrayal, everything begins to spiral. In the aftermath of her heartbreak, Aurora becomes haunted by strange occurrences-missing items, silent phone calls, and a creeping sense of being watched. Dismissing her fears as paranoia, she tries to move forward, only to be abducted by an unknown, twisted stalker.

Trapped and isolated, Aurora's survival depends on her unraveling the mind of her captor and the dark obsession that led her there. As she pieces together chilling truths, she must confront secrets from her past and navigate a harrowing game where trust is a dangerous gamble and escape may be impossible. A psychological thriller that explores love, betrayal, and the resilience of the human spirit, this book will keep readers on the edge of their seats until the final page.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Nocturnal Seraph
description:
The Nocturnal Seraph is a malevolent, otherworldly entity that preys on grief, guilt, and fear. Once an angelic figure, it has become twisted and corrupted, feeding on the emotional pain of those it marks. It manipulates reality, erodes sanity, and spreads its influence like a shadow, leaving despair and destruction in its wake.

In the shadow of grief, Evan moves in with his distant grandparents, seeking solace but finding only unease. As strange occurrences grow, he and his sharp-witted neighbor, Tara, stumble into a chilling mystery that refuses to be ignored. A sinister presence stalks their every move, preying on fear and regret, unraveling their sense of reality. Together, they must untangle the secrets of the past and confront the darkness creeping into their lives. But the closer they get to the truth, the more they realize this isn't just a haunting-it's a game, and the stakes are far deadlier than they could have imagined.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Veil Of Vengeance
description:
When 5 friends travel to Dehradun, they unknowingly check into a haunted mansion with a dark past. The ghost of Abhinav, a betrayed businessman, haunts the mansion, seeking revenge on the family that destroyed his life. His tragic story-a family's greed that led to the murder of his wife and children-terrifies the group, but Riddhi forms an unexpected bond with him.

Desperate for justice and redemption, Abhinav offers Riddhi a chilling choice: help him seek revenge, or be trapped by his restless spirit forever. As they grow closer, Riddhi must decide if she will risk everything to help a ghost find peace-and uncover the true cost of revenge.

The Veil Of Vengeance is a haunting tale of betrayal, love, and the fight for redemption in the shadow of death.

title: She is Fatal to Death (Standalone Story)
description:
She's dead by the third chapter.
Okay, it's a bit more complicated than that.
Okay, it's A LOT more complicated than that. 

Renata wants nothing more than to pay her bills through her mildly boring office job and figure out whether she is still in love with her best friend. The latter half of that desire is just a sneak peak into her messy life-and it's only getting messier. 

Considering the paranormal world she is about to dive head first into, she will come to realize that figuring out her heart may just be the easiest part of this journey. 

Well, the endless supply of supernatural hotness in this story may beg to differ-but that's besides the point.  Either way, it's gonna be a killer time ;) 

EXCERPT 

        Chicken tacos it is. 
	Right as Renata grabbed the ingredients, she turned to put them next to the stove, where a clean, plastic cutting board awaited. But as she moved, she was confronted by a stranger, an intruder, standing mere inches from her.
	Before she could scream, he was on her, slamming her against the fridge. Her back flashed with sharp pain. Her eyes pricked with fear as she drank in his uncovered face. Deeply tanned skin. Ruby red eyes-ruby red eyes? Thick, slashing eyebrows. Flat, broad nose. Buzzcut. Handsome. That was as far as she would go in complimenting him considering this guy held a knife to her throat.
	When he spoke, his voice came out like thunder. It held a thousand threats and a thousand secrets. It held promise of pain if provoked. "If you scream," he warned, mouth pulled in a slight snarl, "this ends quickly."
	She didn't dare nod against the blade. He noticed and amusement lit up for just a second in those devilish eyes. Oh, whoever the fuck this was, she already hated him. Considering her predicament, panic was the most prominent emotion coursing through her at the moment. "Good." He removed his hand "Now you're going to answer my questions."

°°MATURE AND EXPLICIT CONTENT OF ALL KINDS, AND I MEAN ALL KINDS°
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Psychotic Killer? How to Get Away!
description:
#1 - romanticsuspense #3 - mystery
As a four years old child, Kimberly Jacobs, made global news as a psychotic. A child who murdered her own mother in cold blood. 

And now, thirty years later. The evil cycle has repeated itself again. Someone in Kim's life - her husband - has been savagely murdered. On a night Kim sent all their employees home. 

So many possible reasons for Kim to want her husband dead, but, did she do it?

Did she pull the knife to end the life of the father of her child? Or is someone trying to implicate her, so she makes global news again?

But this time, it wouldn't just end there. 

She could go to prison, and serve life imprisonment. Or in fact, face the death penalty.

For a crime, she may or may not have committed.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Camp Driftwood
description:
Kaylee Adams is trapped. In the clutches of a vicious cult, the solution of the rich and god-fearing to change sons and daughters for the better, who can be trusted?

In the heart of the Hundred-Mile Wilderness, within walls of the isolated camp, dark hands are at work. These people have been watching Kaylee for a long time, and their ambitions reach far beyond the confines of the camp. 

Nobody walks out of Camp Driftwood quite the same as they went in, and Kaylee is no exception. Right now, she only has one mission. Get out alive, with her sanity intact.

That said, my updating schedule is basically nonexistent and sometimes I just vanish for a couple of months at a time when I have no motivation to write. Again, sorry. I truly appreciate anyone that's read through my stories and leaves some feedback to help me improve, you're all truly wonderful. If you'd ever like a chat or would like to know about how close an update for a particular story is to coming out, just shoot me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as I see it.

Some users of Chris report him as:

"Actually a complete goblin, one and a half stars."

"An anxious wreck with no real talent for writing, entirely unreliable."

"The worst thing to happen to Australia since the Emu War."

"Somehow, quantifiably worse than a headache."

Cheers lads and lasses, I'll see you when I get back from my next nervous breakdown.

title: He is a Psycho
description:
Blaire Addison was a normal teenager. She goes to a boarding school for girls in the middle of Texas.  Blaire thought her life was normal until she met Elliot. 
Elliot was the son of the headmistress (Ms. Jones) of the boarding school. Ms. Jones always knew there was something peculiar about her son but she never questioned Elliot because she never cared. The worst part of it all Ms. Jones would get anything or anyone her son wanted just so he would leave her alone. 
When Elliot meets Blaire his life is changed. His true colors come out and he becomes obsessed with Blaire. 
Can Blaire escape a madman? Can Elliot be stopped? Read to find out.

title: Chasing His Rose
description:
-The most thrilling and mind-blowing crime case of the 21st Century-

In 2019, there were a series of deadly killings observed in the thick forest of Embalia; a small country lining the borders of Asia. The victims seemed to be clawed and simply preys on animal attacks, yet there was one particular similarity that made many think that the killings had something more to do with than being just animal attacks. A young woman would always be found at the crime scenes, crying her heart out. 

Detective Zayan was smart, bored and one of the best detectives of Asia. The curious case of the Embalia killings soon caught his eye and whole interest, especially when the prime suspect was a woman with such charm and innocence that he couldn't help but feel captivated.

title: The Infected Mind
description:
[Book 1]

Crawlers: once normal people like you or me. They had hobbies, families, friends, interests, but now they are feral monsters. The infection spread, wiping out almost half the human race, and leaving the rest as either Crawlers or Survivors. The infected's eyes will black out, before giant, black, bug-like legs will rip out of their back, giving them a newfound speed and agility, as well as an insatiable bloodlust. Body fluids entering any open wound, including the eyes, mouth, and nose, will seal the person's fate; they are now infected. It won't be long before they start screeching at the moon in a mock howl.

The problem is, I am infected. I turned but retained most of my humanity. With my new lifestyle in a new world, I can't expect anything or anyone to act as I predict. My biggest question is, can I save my humanity? Or will I simply become part of the mindless feral swarm?

title: Malefic - Afterlife #1 (Sunday Updates)
description:
Do you believe in the supernatural?

I didn't. Not until I died. I was ten when I was clinically dead for twenty minutes. But I didn't come back alone. Damien, a demon, came back with me. 

It's been seven years. I hate him. The feeling is mutual.

He is beautiful and dangerous. He haunts my every moment. His mission, to return to me to where I belong. Hell. He will deceive, torment, seduce. Whatever it takes.

When I uncover the truth of who Damien is, it will blur the line between heaven and hell.

authorBio:
Hm, introduce myself, huh? Doubt you'll read this.

Sex.

Eh? Bet your eyes did a double take on that one? Well now that I've got your attention let me introduce you to the 932-page autobiography that is my life.

Nah, I'm just playing.

*shoves book under table*

Anywho, I'm a quirky girl who's ultimately full of life and charms *coughs* clearly *coughs*. I enjoy reading and writing books (Nah dip, Sherlock) and I'm a big believer of well written and grammatically correct books.

I'm not saying that I'll bash on you if you have a spelling error or a grammar mistake, but if it's excessive... I'm just going to stop reading, no questions asked.

I also happen to be a big fan of KPOP!

Sex.

Alright, are you back? It's over now, haha! My favorite food is Italian, so if you get me garlic bread I will automatically assume we're dating, no exceptions or questions asked. I love all genres of books, but I do appreciate the lack of cliches.
*cough* super hot white guy meets pretty and smart mouthed nerd in an 'unlikely' relationship as 'fate' brings them together *cough*

Well, I can't believe I spent over one thousand and five hundred words writing about myself, I'm so stuck up. Oh well, who cares.

Now, enjoy my fabulous books, please!

title: TWISTED ICE (ONC 2023)
description:
Five friends, one is a killer. 

On fall break, twenty year old Eliza Goodchild sets off with four of her college friends for a remote cabin in Aspen, Colorado. When a blizzard strikes without warning, their SUV skids off an embankment and disappears into a wooded ravine. In the whiteout, they get lost and find themselves in a frigid wilderness where every wrong move can spell certain death. In their struggle to survive, they learn one of them is a killer. Everyone has secrets and motives, but when the killer claims a second victim, they realize all of them are targets in an icy twisted plot to get away with the perfect murder, or should we say, murders.

title: The Exorcist
description:
Four decades after it first shook the nation, then the world, William Peter Blatty's thrilling masterwork of faith and demonic possession returns in an even more powerful form. Raw and profane, shocking and blood-chilling, it remains a modern parable of good and evil and perhaps the most terrifying novel ever written.

If you enjoyed this excerpt, get the full version at:  http://goo.gl/4Abc70
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Widely regarded as the greatest horror movie ever made, "The Exorcist" broke box office records and terrified audiences around the world. Now, more than four decades after the Academy Award­ nominated film, THE EXORCIST returns as a TV series.

Directed by Rupert Wyatt ("Rise of the Planet of the Apes"), THE EXORCIST is a propulsive psychological thriller following two very different priests tackling one family's case of horrifying demonic possession. FATHER TOMAS ORTEGA (Alfonso Herrera, "Sense8," "The Chosen") is the new face of the Catholic Church: progressive, ambitious and compassionate. He runs a small, but loyal, parish in the suburbs of Chicago. He has no idea that his quiet life is about to change forever. Deep in the slums of Mexico City, another priest has found himself locked in a life­ and ­death struggle with evil. FATHER MARCUS KEANE (Ben Daniels, "Flesh and Bone," "House of Cards") is a modern­ day Templar Knight, an orphan raised since childhood by the Vatican to wage war against its enemies. Father Marcus is everything Father Tomas is not: relentless, abrasive and utterly consumed by his mission - and he constantly butts heads with his adversary within the church, FATHER BENNETT (Kurt Egyiawan, "Beasts of No Nation"). 

THE EXORCIST is from Morgan Creek Productions in association with 20th Century Fox Television. The series was created by Jeremy Slater ("Fantastic Four"). The series is executive­ produced by Slater, Emmy Award nominee Rolin Jones ("Friday Night Lights," "Weeds"), Rupert Wyatt, Roy Lee ("Hidden," "Run All Night") James Robinson ("Dream House"), David Robinson ("Dream House," "The Good Shepherd") and Barbara Wall ("Boss"). Wyatt also served as director on the pilot. Follow the series on Twitter @TheExorcistFOX and join the discussion using #TheExorcist.

title: Fur
description:
Leila Ardeneux was born into a family of werewolves. By every principle of biology and logic, she should be one. But something is wrong with her, something that has caused her skin to be hairless and her teeth unsharp, something that has made her an outcast among her pack. 

She found her only solace in her best friend, Zakai Belfiore. He meant the world to her and she to him. They grew up together, playing childish games and pulling spiteful pranks. It was them against the world and they were inseparable, until they were torn apart. 

When they were fourteen, Zakai's family left the pack, thereby forcing him to leave Leila. 

After two years without him, Leila leaves as well. She runs away from her abusive pack to build a life as a human. For three years it works, and for the first time, her life is almost peaceful. 

Then one night a familiar scent wafts through the air, a dead body appears under a bridge, and someone is stalking her new human family. 

As the past converges upon the volatile present, Leila finds that she cannot outrun her blood so easily--or the right her birth has damned her to.




Weekly updates!

Cover made by @Silverless

title: Caged Bird | ✔
description:
The Bird:
Ava Thompson has only ever wanted things that seem out of reach.
the further they are, the better.

like having  her mother return from the dead,
or getting her boss to leave his wife for her,
maybe acquiring her step father's love,
even pursuing a career in something that she might never be successful in

Because if she can just reach one of them, surely her hunger for more will dissipate?

The bird catcher:
he knows what the bird doesn't. he knows that the bird flutters against the bars that cage her in, yearning for freedom
yet the bird has never known freedom.
the bird catchers desires are simple;
all he wants is the bird

title: Red Riding Strawberry
description:
Ichigo Red Kurosaki (Ichigo Kurosaki) is the town's cute little teenage boy who loves to spend time in the forest at the edge of the town's limits, and loves his red hooded sweatshirt. He is stubborn and likes to do things his way. So when his father tries to make him marry a girl he has no feelings for, he runs off to the woods and gets lost. After spending the night in a tree, Ichigo wakes to find a person, no, a creature watching him from below. It spoke to itself with a deep voice, and Ichigo could feel the smirk on the creature's face, "My, my. What a treat we have here."

authorBio: Well, I guess you could call me one of those major fangirls, and I like to think I'm an Otaku. I love to draw, write stories (HAZA!!!), and well, listen to music. title: Mr. 8
description:
A Paranormal Thriller

Psychology professor Denton Reed has been pulled out of the classroom to find a killer. Bodies are turning up all over the quiet town of Bexhill. They are found dismembered and burned beyond recognition in a snow covered farmer's field, by the abandoned mill, and under the train bridge. The only clue linking the victims is the bizarre figure-eight patterns left behind in their homes.

Denton must use his unique profiling techniques to uncover the murderer, who the police have dubbed Mr. 8. As he begins to unravel the mystery, a strange pattern begins to emerge. Before their deaths, each victim was seized by dark obsessions and inexplicable changes in behavior. Whatever strange forces are affecting the people of Bexhill, they may actually be more dangerous than any killer.

As a wave of insanity sweeps the town, Denton will put his life on the line to get to the source of the madness and risk all to protect the woman he loves.

But is it already too late?


[Rated PG-13 For scenes of violence and strong language]  

*Cover art by Donald Cronkhite.


Best RankingMay 12, 2014 - #1 Mystery/Thriller, #2 Horror
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
It's fair to say, I wouldn't be writing today if I hadn't joined Wattpad back in 2013. I'd been writing as a hobby, merely to amuse myself, but was getting restless and wanted more. It was time to push new boundaries and share my work with an audience. By luck or fate, I came across Wattpad. Here I found a  warm, supportive, and nurturing community of peers who built up both my skills and my confidence.

It's been quite the journey. My first full length serialized novel, MR. 8, reached the top of both the Horror and the Mystery charts and received a publishing deal. I was invited to join the Wattpad Stars program, and through it, I was contracted to write the PARANORMAL ACTIVITY movie tie-in, THE GARRISON PROJECT (which was later published as a novella), and was given the opportunity to teach a course on storytelling. But my biggest achievement has been the friends I've made along the way.

If you choose to read my work, prepare yourself for some strangeness. I write fiction that falls into a nebulous zone between horror, science-fiction, paranormal, and fantasy. I enjoy being surprised by the things I read, so I try to take my own stories in surprising directions.

Find out more at http://www.DavidJThirteen.com

You can sign up for my monthly newsletter at http://eepurl.com/dBqP1r

And you can follow me on:
Twitter --  http://twitter.com/davidjthirteen
Instagram -- http://www.instagram.com/davidjthirteen
Goodreads -- http://www.goodreads.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/show/19708548-david-thirteen

title: The Diseased Heart
description:
[Book 2]

"The only ways to kill a Crawler are to sever the head or remove the heart. If any muscle remains in the body, the heart will regrow. If the head is touching the neck at all, it will fuse back."

I've died several times in my life. Being shot in the head by my best friend, being dismembered and mutilated by another, and being beheaded by the Crawler king.

I wasn't supposed to come back this time, but fate has some plans for me. I had always wondered what the future would look like, but I didn't think I would ever see.

A new chapter is being written in my story, and no one else knows.

title: My Mafia Man
description:
Alexis Young is a simple and easy going woman. She is fresh out of college and she just opened a small bakery. She was doing great, she is quick to love and her baked goods always brought her costumers back. One late night, she just locked the bakery and headed home when she heard a noise in the back alley. Worried, that someone needs help, she walked into it, only to witness a murder.
  
  But it was not just a murder, it was a mafia murder. Young new mafia boss, Luciano Moretti, murdered a man that own him money. Alexis couldn't believe her eyes and it was just her luck, that the big bad mafia man saw her and took her with him.

WARNING: This has been written by a much younger self in about a month for Camp Nanowrimo, so it is still full of grammar errors and awkward sentences. I haven't gotten around to actually editing it and i probably never will... so ignore the "reviewed and edited" chapters, because they do not really exist. They all have mistakes, so there is really no need for you to warn me about them.  I hope you enjoy the story anyway.

authorBio:

Many of the topics that may be covered are done so in a highly fictitious way. 

Abusive behaviors are not cured by a conversation, and "love" will not fix someone. If you or someone you know is in an abusive situation please contact the appropriate abuse hotline, or find other methods of support and help if getting authorities involved is out of the question. You are worth being treated with respect, and kindness, so don't listen to stupid fanfic for dating advice.

title: Beckoned Through The Dark
description:
Lesego Medupe has never questioned her identity before, she never wondered about the father she never knew, her dark complexion, or her mother's outrageous rules. That is until a nerve-racking accident introduces her to new faces, some of which only have impure intentions.

Abigail Daniels has spent her entire life searching for something, but never truly finding satisfaction in anything. With an unfaithful husband, an overbearing mother, a demanding career, and her calling, she never imagined her life could get any more complicated. However, her whole existence is thrown off track when an unlucky victim ends up in hospital, bringing dark spirits in her course.

Lesego and Abigail's lives cross paths when they get caught up in a web of lies and secrets after Lesego's estranged twin sister, Karabelo, wreaks havoc in their lives.

In their quest to get rid of Karabelo, they discover that everyone around them has their own agenda and that Lesego had another life before, which she does not remember. With no one to trust, but each other, it is up to them to work together in order to solve the puzzle and unravel all the secrets around their birth and families.

Unknown to them, there is more to the story than what meets the eye, and with every second they waste, more people are at risk of losing their lives.
Will they be able to figure out all the secrets in time to save the lives of their loved ones, or will they have to spend the rest of their lives watching over their shoulders?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a 25-year-old  aspiring writer and poet from South Africa, with a passion for words.

My biggest motivation is that: if you have a story that keeps you up at night, it deserves to be shared with the world; write and don't wait another second because no one is ever going to tell your story better than you, and most importantly, you never know whose lives your stories are going to impact.

Like they say, "The pen is mightier than the sword." So, please, beautiful people, keep sharing your magic and make the world a better place.

Thank you so much for taking the time to read my books. I hope you enjoy them and that you will continue with me on this journey.

I love meeting writers from all parts of the world, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.❣

I love exploring different genres and I love to write about secrets, lies, mysteries, suspense -and I'm a sucker for DRAMA. So, if you are looking for crazy adventures with plot twists that will keep you at the edge of your seats, you've come to the right place!

title: Another dumb teen book
description:
"Oh I..I'm I'm..?" The words wouldnt form. I backed up slowly as he cocked his head to the side, confusion on his face. Then he did the last thing I expected, he smiled. A face splitting smile that sent shivers down my spine. This was it I was going to die. I hit some kind of nerve and sent him over the egde. I closed my eyes preparing myself for the worst. I opened them to see him coming towards me. I backed up until I hit wall behind me. He kept coming until he was inches from my face. He slammed his hands on either side of my head, blocking any exit. I kept my eyes on anything but his face.    "I'm.. I didn't..please"   

What happens when the new guy in school is a convicted felon? Sadie is a good girl but she gets lost in his troubled past. When sex betryal and murder get thrown into the mix will they survive or will they crash and burn.

title: When Death takes notice
description:
Games can be fun, but some games end rather badly. What happens when a young girl plays a game that catches the attention of someone that's not only bad, but deadly?

Because once you kiss death... well... lets's just say that a killer doesn't kiss and tell...

<3 This is a sample of my book. The book can now be found on Amazon, both as a paperback and as a digital book. It was free for five days in March 2020 to thank the wonderful readers here on Wattpad that supported me while I wrote the book. Thanks again for the support, it meant a lot. <3 

NB! Warning some people might find this twisted love story disturbing. Stockholm syndrome* will be comming into play. The published version of the book is mature. The book starts off somewhat light, but it does get darker chapter by chapter. It is not recommended for a younger audience, nor for those who might take offense with strong language, sex scenes, non consensual acts, violence etc. 



Happy reading :D



*Stockholm syndrome is a condition that causes hostages to develop a psychological alliance with their captors as a survival strategy during captivity. These feelings, resulting from a bond formed between captor and captives during intimate time spent together, are generally considered irrational in light of the danger or risk endured by the victims. Generally speaking, Stockholm syndrome consists of "strong emotional ties that develop between two persons where one person intermittently harasses, beats, threatens, abuses, or intimidates the other.

title: Monster (Cartoon Cat x Reader)
description:
I saw literally none of these on Quotev and I'm crazy enough to actually make one. Warning: THIS IS A YANDERE STORY! As such, and given the nature of this cryptid, there will be heavy violence. 

You had gone searching for the paranormal, believing that the worst you'd face was death. What you found was more than enough to banish such naivety. Death is a mercy for the hunted, a sanctuary for the tormented, and a respite from the unspeakable things of the world. No, death was not the worst thing you were destined to face. No... the only thing you found was despair, obsession, and greed. The only thing you found... were monsters.

As with all my stories, constructive criticism is encouraged as long as it's actually constructive. Enjoy the story!

title: The Cat's in the Cradle - The Last of Us
description:

And the cat's in the cradle and the silver spoon.
Little boy blue and the man in the moon. 
"When you coming home, dad?" "I don't know when."
But we'll get together then.
You know we'll have a good time then. 

~~~•••~~~

Ellie's twin sister, Sophie, is her antithesis. Ellie is rash, impulsive, and hotheaded. Sophie is quiet, sensitive, and passionate. Though they're opposites, they keep each other grounded. Sophie helps Ellie from going over the edge, and Sophie would have never survived the world they found themselves living in if Ellie wasn't there.

The song of Sophie's life was Ellie. 

And then a hardened man that is thrusted into their lives becomes another song of Sophie's life. 

A song that is messy, but beautiful all the same.

A song that she loves and treasures.

~~~•••~~~

The Last of Us - Season 1

title: Path of the Necromancer - FACTION WARS
description:
All Ian has ever wanted is to live free. Free from responsibility, from prejudice, and, is it so much to ask, from persecution for being a Necromancer. After becoming the resident Mage for the Night Watch, the... magically challenged Faction in Seattle's warring supernatural underworld, Ian is beginning to believe that he has finally found a place that will accept his 'gift.'
But while undertaking a job for the Kin, thus securing his shaky position, corrupt forces step in to tear him away from his new home. With his Grimoire mentor, Succubus lover, and Flesh Golem protector in tow, Ian sets forth to show his rivals that he is willing to raise bodies from the ground to protect those he cares for. Only when a Lich, a Slayer, and a Siren - oh my! - join a growing group that look to him for guidance, Ian quickly realises that his power puts him in a unique position to make a place for not just himself, but others like him, to live free. 
Armed with the knowledge of the depraved acts those in charge are making, Ian knows he must cripple the Factions (no problem) to reveal how deep the corruption goes (little harder), without alienating his own side (no promises).
RR
* * * * *
This is the sequel to the published novel: Path of the Necromancer - ORIGINS.
Feedback is welcome.

title: The Watcher's Gaze
description:
Sarah Collins, recently divorced and seeking a fresh start, moves into a quaint, picturesque home with her five-year-old son, Ethan. The charming neighborhood seems like the perfect place to rebuild their lives, offering peace and a sense of community. Sarah is hopeful that this new beginning will bring stability and joy back into their lives after the turbulence of the past year.

However, not everything is as idyllic as it seems. The house behind theirs, hidden behind a tangle of overgrown hedges and a dilapidated fence, has a sinister aura. Its occupant, Mr. Grey, an enigmatic and reclusive man, only adds to the eerie vibe. Sarah notices Mr. Grey often standing in his dimly lit windows, watching their house with an unsettling intensity.

Sarah can't shake the feeling of being watched. Despite the friendly faces in the neighborhood, Mr. Grey's looming presence becomes an inescapable shadow over their new life. Sarah is determined to uncover the truth about her unsettling neighbor, but what she discovers might be more than she ever imagined, plunging her and Ethan into a mystery that will test their courage and resilience.

title: The Nightmare Has Only Begun
description:
Jonhathan Khol finally had his happy life away from his parents and the bullies at school. In his twenties with a five year old son and another child on the way with his now loving boyfriend after their rocky start why wouldn't it be? 

Well it was until his fears and nightmares of sorts about the future came true. All it took was a run in with a familiar face then a knock at the door a few days later to bring everything to an end. 

In less than a week his quiet happy life turned upside down by those looking in and seeing him dealing with a bad case of Stockholm Syndrome. Because falling in love with the man to trap you in his attic for months, until you obey his rules, seems strange to the normal person.

 No one sees it how Jonhathan does. No one will. No one can when dark secrets are slowly being uncovered at the house Jonhathan has called home for years. Sinister crimes unraveled by the police which took place in the very house and just outside.

title: The Apocalypse
description:

title: The Relentless desire
description:
This is the story of **Damian Knight**, a powerful mafia lord feared across the globe. Not only does Damian dominate the criminal underworld, but he's also a successful businessman. Whatever he wants, he gets-at any cost. No one dares to stand in his way.

On the other side is **Elena Carter**, a beautiful and strong-willed young girl. Stubborn to the core, Elena always gets what she sets her mind to-except when it comes to violence. That's the one line she refuses to cross.

But what happens when Damian Knight, the ruthless mafia king, crosses paths with the fiery Elena Carter? Will his obsession break her stubborn heart, or will she be the one to challenge his dark desires?  

Dive into a world of power, danger, and love as their lives collide in a thrilling tale that will leave you wanting more!!
