title: Frankenstein's Guide (Book 1, the LiteraTours Cozy Mystery Series)
description:
Jessica "Ike" Wordsworth can dive into books, but she isn't prepared for a monster - and a ruthless murderer killing her tourists.
 
Ike is fighting the aftermath of a nasty divorce that left her husband in custody of her homesitting business - and her beloved cats.
With nothing but a turquoise construction trailer to call her home, Ike invests her last quid and becomes partner in a tour company specialising in bespoke trips for book-lovers. When the guide hired to take on the first tour drops out at the last minute, Ike has to take over and steer her guests towards the cradle of Mary Shelley's "Frankenstein".
All to soon she realises there truly are monsters on the loose, one of them a ruthless killer who's targetting her tourists. 
To unearth the truth, Ike will have to cooperate with her moronic partner, Gary Sands, 13th Baron of Nettlehole and founder of LiteraTours. When they don't succeed in stopping the killer, she realises she'll have to take the plunge and draw on some rather unusual skills her family has been hiding from the world  . . .
"Frankenstein's Guide" is the first instalment in the "LiteraTours Cozy Mystery series".

[[word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]

Cover designed by Ren T

authorBio:
I'm Allan Lynfester. I've always loved writing. It's my passion. Nothing brings me more satisfaction than using my imagination to create a whole new world. I write mostly suspense/mystery/thrillers, but I also write other genres. I also write poems and I love reading.

It has always been my dream to become a famous writer, but it always seemed out of reach. So I'm very happy that I've discovered Wattpad. I'll now get the chance to have my stories read by not only family and friends, but readers all over the world as well.

I'm a very ambitious and persistent individual, also very driven. I'm very humble, friendly and have a very positive attitude. I thank God for blessing me with this beautiful writing talent, which I can share with the world.

title: Paranormal Case 9
description:
What Valeria Alvarez, a young paranormal activities researcher was to find in the little seaside town of Pacific Grove, was more than shocking. It gave many the notion that what science purports to know of supernatural phenomenon, is still in its infancy. 
Valeria gets pulled into a case that has resonated as a haunting on the California coast for over a hundred years. But what happens when the young subject who recites clues in her sleep begins to give details which encroach horrifically upon the life of the researcher herself? 
Valeria's romantic involvement with a professor who brings her into the case, further complicates her dealings as she begins to learn of her own hidden connection to the occult. The case brings the young researcher to a nexus of light and dark elements in the spiritual world. But in the process, she experiences a harrowing descent into the world of paranormal activity.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am fascinated by the long view of what makes us human--those survival related things we do each day and night that distinguish us from the beasts of nature and yet keep us tied to them.

Physical anthropology tells us we've been here on the Blue Planet for over 4 million years--(that's 80,000 lifetimes stacked one on the other). And guess how many of those lifetimes we've spent in caves? All but the last 200!

It explains a lot. That we still carry around  our "cave thinking" today. Things like aggression, lust, hunger, and awe. All behaviors we try to justify in context with  this technological world we have created. I am charmed that we are such inventors but perplexed that we remain lower than the angels. 

The name "Califia"  is just one extension of who I am. For those of you who are interested, she was a literary character from a Medieval Spanish romance--created around 1510 as an "Amazon queen."

Califia was supposed to have ruled an island somewhere on the uncharted side of the "terrestrial paradise" (the New World). The early explorers knew her story well and were lustfully attracted to her as a muse. They dreamed of her as they sailed across the seas, and that is why they put her name on the first western maps of the unknown world: "California"--Latin for "Califia's land."

Enjoy!
~~Califia

title: Easy Innocence
description:
How far will teen girls go for approval from their peers? Pretty far, it turns out.

When pretty, smart Sara Long is found bludgeoned to death, it's easy to blame the man with the bat. But when Georgia Davis -- former cop and newly-minted PI -- is hired to look into the incident at the behest of the accused's sister, what she finds hints at a much different, much darker answer. It seems the privileged, affluent schoolgirls on Chicago's North Shore have learned just how much their innocence is worth to hot-under-the-collar businessmen. But while these girls can pay for their newly gotten Prada pricetags, they don't realize that their new business venture may end up costing them more than they can afford.

I'll post chapters one at a time, but if you just HAVE to find out what happens before they're all up, here's where you can buy the ebook (It's also available in paperback and audio, btw):

http://amzn.com/B001UE8J4Y
https://itunes.apple.com/us/book/easy-innocence/id586071761?mt=11
http://store.kobobooks.com/en-US/ebook/easy-innocence
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, everyone. I've been a member of Wattpad for years but never quite knew how to use it. Now I'm diving in. I hope I do it right. I'm sure you'll let me know.

I write "compulsively readable thrillers" and have 11 novels and and over 20 short stories published. But... and this is important (at least to me)..  I had no plans to be a fiction writer. It wasn't even Plan B. Funny about that.  The story of how that happened is on my website.

In fact I've reinvented myself 4 times. I started out in broadcast news as an assistant film editor for NBC News in New York. Then I moved back to Washington DC where I grew up to work at PBS. I was retrained as an assistant director when Watergate broke (I'm not really that old) and helped produce PBS’s night-time broadcast of the hearings. My second reinvention took me to Chicago where I worked for public relations firm Burson-Marsteller for 8 years. I left there to start Fischer Hellmann Communications. (Are you still counting?) Then came my 4th reinvention, writing crime fiction. That one took.

I'm working on a new novel, and will post chapters as I go. But I'm also going to post chapters of EASY INNOCENCE. It's about high school girls and how far they go for acceptance from their peers. If that goes well, I'll follow up with NOBODY'S CHILD, which also deals with high school girls, but in a very different way.

My novels include the Ellie Foreman series, which I describe as a cross between "Desperate Housewives" and "24"; the Georgia Davis PI Series, which is more hard-boiled, and 3 historical stand-alone thrillers: Set The Night on Fire, A Bitter Veil, and Havana Lost. Lots of short stories too. Everything is available in paperback, ebook, and audio.

I also invite you to swing by Pinterest.com, where I have a board with "50 Free Fiction Writing Tips."


http://facebook.com/authorlibbyfischerhellmann
https://plus.google.com/+LibbyHellmann
https://twitter.com/libbyhellmann
http://www.pinterest.com/libbyfh

title: The Town Whispers: Season 1
description:
Welcome to The Fort - where folk horrors and eldritch terrors meet! The Fort is a town like a thousand other small and stubborn settlements, put where it doesn't belong in a land most unforgiving. There amongst the other townsfolk, live the LaPonte family. Mildred, and Mark - along with their 2 wonderful children. They live in a quaint house; modest and rundown, but very much a home filled with love. 

But all in not well in The Fort....

Dark forces look in on the LaPonte Family, through the windows, standing at the edge of their property where their land meets the overgrown and wild edges of a persistent, and creeping wilderness.

Above, below, and beside are vast worlds of slumbering, malevolent creatures of existentially ambiguous origins, waiting to devour all.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My name is Cole - Creator and Writer of The Town Whispers.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

I grew up, and live on the West Coast of Canada - Here the rain falls unending, and the sun casts long shadows; making monsters of men, women, and children alike. Growing up in a town where there was little in the way of myth and legend, let alone histories to feed on and obsess over - Now I am building my own legends, my own myths, my own histories and sending chills down the spines of listeners and readers..... I hope.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

The Town Whispers is a Narrative Horror Podcast that will tell the many stories hidden behind the rain, and the fog, and the trees of a town called The Fort. Where eldritch terror, and folk horror meet. To listen while you read, make sure to listen by clicking the links below!

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/4zMhegagzaWcdsamKpsTYr

Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/ca/podcast/the-town-whispers/id1528922538

Acast: https://play.acast.com/s/thetownwhispers

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

If you are embarking on your very own tour of The Fort by reading "The Town Whispers", be aware that these chapters remain largely unchanged from how they are spoken and delivered in their original audio format. These are transcripts that can be enjoyed as a sole reading experience, or by reading while you listen along with the podcast!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

For More Information or to follow along with everything happening in The Fort, and with The Town Whispers consider checking out the links below!

Twitter: https://twitter.com/TheTownWhispers

title: Revenant
description:
Meet Joe Nobody . . . and pray he never meets you.

He's average height, with an average build, and average looks - an instantly forgettable face in the crowd. Joe also happens to be a hit man, quite possibly one of the best in the world. He's so good, in fact, that most of his work life has settled into a comfortable routine, where everything goes according to plan, and nothing at all is surprising anymore. He's been just about everywhere, and he's seen it all.

But Joe hasn't seen everything. Not yet . . .

**WARNING** - This work contains several curse words and some extremely violent themes and situations throughout. I mean, the main character is a hit man . . . there's your first sign. You've been warned.

**ADDITIONAL WARNING** - This is soooooooo first-draft-ish, so any problems you see logistically, thematically, or grammatically are all the fault of a combination of absinthe and overzealous fingers. And please, for god's sake, if you see something glaringly wrong, tell me about it!  :)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Aaron Kite is a writer/artist who likes putting slashes between occupations and who very rarely refers to himself in the third person. He was born on the exact same day that São Paulo Metro was inaugurated in Brazil, which the authorities claim is pure coincidence.

He has been interviewed by Science Magazine, the Calgary Herald, National Geographic, and this shady fellow named 'Jimmy' who kept pointedly asking him about his success as a writer with questions like "Got any spare change?" and "C'mon, really, do ya? I gotta catch a bus."

Aaron was one of the founding members of the amateur writing group "Starting Write Now", as well as countless side-projects which he'd mention by name if the government would finally get around to granting him immunity. He lives in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, which really ought to have another sub-section to it, because another comma there would look really slick.

At present he has four finished novels - "Two Cats", the sequel "Jade Mouse", the third novel "Ten Arrows", as well as the standalone (but with sequels percolating in his brain) novel "A Touch of Poison". He's currently in the middle of writing the novel "Revenant", and a collaborative work titled "Shiftless", as well as about eleven or so other books that are all in varying states of doneness. When writing, he likes to disable his spell-checker and make up words, as is illustrated by the use of 'doneness' above.

He's allergic to cats, and thus he tries to arrange it so he's living with one whenever possible, probably just to prove a point of some sort.

title: To Be A Warrior
description:
Book 7 in the To Be A Runner series


New allies, V-Type zombies, rising anarchists, and a country that can't seem to find stable ground.

Yep, that seems about right.

It's been six weeks since Sigrid was taken down, and in those times, things have gone to chaos. A power vacuum has been created, and people are desperate to find a way to keep everything from falling apart.

The cure has been created, but V-Types, the unkillable zombies, still pose a threat. We aren't even sure if the cure works on them. 

Unfortunately, they aren't even our worse problems. The Last Riders, a chaotic group that for a long while did nothing but cause petty chaos and take lives whenever they could, have suddenly turned darker. They did terrible things before, but with the country split and the late leader being reveled as the monster she was, they've decided there's nothing left to live for. They're determined to take us all down.

That's where I come in. As I put more effort in finding a cure for my immortality, as well as keeping my children safe and happy (one child in particular), I also must work remember put the most important things first-which is getting through this second wave of the apocalypse.

It's a good thing we have Colonel Sage and... Veronica to help us. The question is though, can Abel really trust them?

It seems we don't have much choice in the matter, but I've learned to keep an eye on everyone. And I believe I need to look back at the Vikings, learn from them and what we have from the Edda to figure out how to stop these V-Type zombies.

It's time to be a warrior.



Disclaimer: I do not own Zombies, Run! Or any of its characters. I only own the characters I myself created. This is my Five's perspective of season 7 and what happened in between missions.

title: My Stalker
description:
I was just laying down on my bed, cuddled up with a book, when I heard a faint creak on the stairs. The sound was muffled seeing as the door was shut, but I heard it nevertheless. My eyes wandered to the door and I tried to be as silent as possible in my attempt to locate another sound. My body was tense, but relaxed when I didn't hear another noise. It's probably just my imagination, I thought. My paranoia was probably just getting the best of me since I was home alone. I heard the stairs creak again however and I heard... 

Footsteps. 

I put my book down slowly and got off my bed as quietly as I could. Yes, those were definitely footsteps. I opened my door slowly, trying to be as silent as possible. There was someone already on the other side of the door, however, and I screamed.

Girl x Girl I suppose?? Doesn't really revolve around it but there is some Girl x Girl ish in here so... yeah.

You are home alone, and you hear on the news about the profile of a murderer who is on the loose. You look out the sliding glass doors to your backyard, and you notice a man standing out in the snow. You look back out the glass as you press the phone to your ear, and notice he is much closer to you now. You then drop the phone in shock. There are no footprints in the snow... It's his reflection.

A mysterious boy.
Rachel has to adapt to the new secret visitor that only she knows the truth about.
A boy and a girl.
An unconscious, forbidden love.

* * * * *

My breath caught in my throat as I looked down at the boy huddled in the corner of the shed, his luminous and electric eyes slowly closing. He didn't know I stood there, open mouthed and witless, watching him. But there I was. And if on that day my mother hadn't asked me to double check the doors on the shed so raccoons wouldn't poop in it again, I would have never discovered him. He would have just disappeared like a ghost. 

I knew what he was. And he wasn't human even though he looked it. 

He was far from being a human. 

* * * * *

title: Never told Nursery Rhymes
description:
Are these the sort of things you like, my dear?
the stories and the rhymes that make you shake?
are you the sort who seeks darkness and fear?
I surely hope you are, for your own sake.


In here you'll meet the fear who has a face,
in here you'll feel the cold under your bed,
In here the childhood terrors have a space,
And bedsheets are all weaved of spiders' thread.


So, gather one and all who relish fear,
and gather those who savour grim good times,
find your peace and gladness walking here,
in the Never Told Nursery Rhymes.


****

These are a few grim little rhymes of my own invention, although I'm sure many of you have noticed that quite a few have outside inspiration. Some of them are meant to be scary, some of them are just meant to have an enjoyable atmosphere, but hopefully at least a few will tickle your fancy.  I just want to thank you all
for your support as it means alot. And a special shoutout to @StJoey77 and @FlukeAuriola for being the best of friends to me.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writing is the purest way to talk to the world. It is fun, and boring, and satisfying, and painful, and awsome, and awful.

That's all that I need to think about if I ever want to write something. Every piece of input you give me is valuable, so thank you.

Short stories for when I'm feeling creative, Poems for when I'm feeling expressive, and everything in between.

Please enjoy your stay, and don't take this nonsense too seriously.

One final word. Don't you ever delete what you've written. Ever. Take it off the website, but keep everything, I implore you.

title: Into the Dead(ON HOLD)
description:
🚫 CAUTION 🚫

||DO NOT CROSS THE PATH||

People are requested to not cross the path. HIGHLY LIFE HAZARDOUS PLACE. Issued under the National Police Department of Japan.


And to her surprise, there was a chain tied up from the corners. It must be the path. And it must be the one that everyone are speaking about.
Though it was written clearly, she dared to enter.

"You still want to go into the forest?", he asked.

" I'm gonna do anything to save my sister",she replied.

"Listen, you are taking a risk."

"It's OK! I'll bring her alive."

"Well...then... Let's enter Into the Dead!  "
      
                       **********

Welcome to Aokigahara forest, also known as the Sea of Trees, is a forest on the northwestern flank of Japan's Mt. Fuji thriving on 30 square kilometers of hardened lava.

The forest has a historical reputation for paranormal activity and as a home to "yurei" or ghosts of the dead in Japanese mythology. In recent years Aokigahara has become internationally known as one of Japan's most popular destinations for suicide.

Samara had a tough childhood. She was a paranoic homicide and a victim of a curse. When her sister went missing in the world's deadliest forest, Aokigahara, she decides to bring her back.
Will she ever save her?
Or will she abide before the fate?

title: The Atrocity Artist
description:
Among gallery owners and collectors, Skad is known as The Atrocity Artist for his transgressive paintings depicting zombified people fused with transistors, vacuum tubes, and circuit boards. But his true masterpiece, his ultimate atrocity, has been his own existence. To reach his goals, Skad has destroyed more lives than he can remember, all with a cruel blend of indifference, malice, and glee.

Now, reeling from the death of his estranged son and facing his own approaching mortality, he returns to his family home on Lake Sauvage to get some peace. But the community by the water has a long memory, and in its earth, the past refuses to stay dead.

David J. Thirteen presents a Wattpad Exclusive: THE ATROCITY ARTIST, a story of quiet horror.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
It's fair to say, I wouldn't be writing today if I hadn't joined Wattpad back in 2013. I'd been writing as a hobby, merely to amuse myself, but was getting restless and wanted more. It was time to push new boundaries and share my work with an audience. By luck or fate, I came across Wattpad. Here I found a  warm, supportive, and nurturing community of peers who built up both my skills and my confidence.

It's been quite the journey. My first full length serialized novel, MR. 8, reached the top of both the Horror and the Mystery charts and received a publishing deal. I was invited to join the Wattpad Stars program, and through it, I was contracted to write the PARANORMAL ACTIVITY movie tie-in, THE GARRISON PROJECT (which was later published as a novella), and was given the opportunity to teach a course on storytelling. But my biggest achievement has been the friends I've made along the way.

If you choose to read my work, prepare yourself for some strangeness. I write fiction that falls into a nebulous zone between horror, science-fiction, paranormal, and fantasy. I enjoy being surprised by the things I read, so I try to take my own stories in surprising directions.

Find out more at http://www.DavidJThirteen.com

You can sign up for my monthly newsletter at http://eepurl.com/dBqP1r

And you can follow me on:
Twitter --  http://twitter.com/davidjthirteen
Instagram -- http://www.instagram.com/davidjthirteen
Goodreads -- http://www.goodreads.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/show/19708548-david-thirteen

title: To Be A Rebel
description:
Book 5 in the To Be A Runner series. I suggest you read the other four (and short story) before reading this one to avoid confusion.





An evil government leader, a terrible life on the run, immune babies, and no home.

Yep, that sounds about right.

It's been a month since Sigrid took over Abel, and I, along with Sam, Janine and Maxine have been trying to find a way to take it back, to win back our home and stop the Minister.

We still don't know why she started all of this, why she engineered the apocalypse to happen, but we will find out all her secrets, sooner or later, with the help of some new friends, and old ones.

But I've got a lot of things to worry about-the voices in my head and what I've seen, and if I can keep up an act. Because if I can't...

It's time for me to take a stand. We are the rebellion. We are stronger than anyone believes us to be. Our reputations have been tainted, but that will not stop us. 

I know what it's like to be someone who does what they're told, but not anymore. Now it's time to be a rebel.









Disclaimer: I do not own Zombies, Run! Or any if it's characters. I only one the characters I created all on my own. This is my Runner Five's journey through season five during and in between missions.

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Nate D. Burleigh is a #speculativefiction #shorthorrorstory #horror #SciFi #youngadult #vampire #fantasy #shockhorror and #splatterpunk  author who currently resides in Vancouver, WA, with his wife. In the thralls of night, his doppelganger tears its way free from Nate's flesh. It feverishly types away into the wee hours of the morning weaving intricate tales of terror.

Splatterpunk was a movement within horror fiction in the 1980's, distinguished by its graphic, often gory, depiction of violence and "hyperintensive horror with no limits. The term was coined in 1986 by David J. Schow at the Twelfth World Fantasy Convention in Providence, Rhode Island.
--Wikipedia.com

title: Pocket Full of Lies
description:
What will you do when you are one step away from being declared as a prime suspect of a crime?

****

Although innocent, 22 year old Muskaan, clearly knows that all evidences points out against her and only her. There is nothing that can save her from becoming the prime suspect of a crime, she never committed, except...except for one lie. A single lie that everyone already believes to be true. A lie that could make her life much better than the current one. A lie that was spread much before she decided to embrace it. A lie that would turn her from being a mere housekeeper to being the girlfriend of her ex-boss.

However, it is a known fact that it never ends with one lie. To cover up one, you need to keep on lying. But the question is until when? Until when can you keep up with all those lies. Probably when ones pockets start overflowing from those little lies.

Until then- You Lie...to Survive.

title: One by one
description:
It wasn't very difficult to plan out my first victim. I watched them all day, studied their movements, listened to their conversations, and watched them fall asleep. The funny thing about it was that I was just a few feet away from them. But how could they have known? Why would they have to be scared for their lives when they were oblivious to how fast I could end them? 
	
	When all goes wrong, nothing else can go right. A last week school field trip could cost you your life. But why think that way when the trip has yet to begin.
When a group of five friends go on a school field trip to the woods, things seem normal until one of them goes missing.

title: The Z Contingency
description:
The zombie apocalypse is coming.  A scientist at the CDC has that terrifying realization when infected victims start displaying the symptoms predicted by his model.  A virus responsible for hemorrhagic fevers is mutating into something that zombifies its victims instead of killing them.

Realizing the only hope is to get ahead of it, he sets out to create a vaccine, but to create a vaccine he needs a sample of the virus.  He tries to enlist the aid of a colleague to help him create the very virus he wants to eradicate, but she refuses on ethical grounds. 

Witnessing the horrific transformation of an infected patient forces her to reconsider, but before they can start working on a vaccine, their virus samples are stolen.

As they criss-cross the country on a hunt for a cure, the paths of the two scientists cross those of a shadow organization on a secret mission, and a loose-knit network of zombie prepper groups whose loyalties are unclear.

I am editing The Z Contingency for an updated edition, and I thought Wattpad would be a good platform to get improvements suggested by readers. 

The first edition of the book is already available for the Kindle, Nook, and Kobo at major online resellers, and is also at Smashwords.

Check out these reviews:
http://the-avidreader.blogspot.com/2014/05/review-z-contingency-by-wi-eganson.html
http://www.gadgetgirlreviews.com/2013/12/the-z-contingency-by-wi-eganson-book.html
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: W.I. Eganson leads a double life in the San Francisco Bay Area.  By day, Eganson helps people live better lives working at a large healthcare organization, then turns to plotting good against evil with a selection of mighty fountain pens (or computer) by night.  The Z Contingency is Eganson’s debut novel.

title: Dead Advent: New World Order (Book 1)
description:
"...one by one the lights flickered off. The air-conditioner stopped functioning and the room was flooded with the humid warmth of mid-spring. From the bedroom, I heard the TV shut off as sounds of the football match abruptly cut off. A loud rumble that sounded like huge machinery cranking echoed through the corridors.

The last bulb flickered off, and we were left enveloped in total darkness. Ruby's soft whimpers drifted into the bathroom. A last drop of water that had been hanging on the opening of the tap fell loose, hitting the sink with an unusually deafening 'plop'. A sick feeling began to rise in my stomach. Something has changed, something has happened. My life would no longer be mundane."

A normal peaceful evening escalates into a nightmare when the school dormitory is placed on lockdown and Emaline is trapped inside. Armed with nothing but a baseball bat, Emaline will have to fight her way through new terrors that have arisen, friends that have turned into flesh hungry monsters and hostile troops. And every bite is fatal. A new world order has arrived, and you'd better learn the rules fast.

Rated PG-13...I think? Just be prepared for some gory descriptions and strong language. Other than that, mostly just good zombie scares. ;)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a dystopian-anarchy-zombie-guts-fantasy-pirate-anime freak and below, in no order of preference, are a few of my favorite things.

1) TWD (obviously)

2) Daryl Dixon my future husband.

3) Peter Pan my best friend.

4) Inuyasha my hero.

5) Music, whatever the genre might be. And I particularly love epic music!

6) Soya ice-cream

7) Bigbang #THEKINGS #VIPLOVEFOREVER

8) Game of Thrones... Still crying.


CURRENTLY... working on my story called Dead Advent: New World Order.

It's basically about an 18 year old girl who's quite angsty and cynical but bad ass regardless who finds herself trapped in the school dormitory when it is suddenly placed on lockdown. The book will chronicle her escape and then her fight against both the dead and living as she travels across America in search for a safe haven with her friends.

I've already got the outline of the story planned out, but who knows what kind of surprises my writing will lead to? Shit gets really intense half way through the first book, and there's definitely a lot more going on than just trying to survive.... so look forward to it!

I welcome all sorts of criticism as long as it helps me improve as a writer. Thanks for your support!

title: Not in The System
description:
Not in the System is a dark, paranormal mystery set in Jingle's Circus Emporium, a once-beloved indoor amusement park now haunted by secrets. The story follows Levi, a 17 year old mechanic, and his journey at JCE dealing with the animatronics and the things that lie deep within the emporium.

What starts as a routine job quickly spirals into chaos as Levi discovers that the animatronics are acting strangely, behaving almost human and exhibiting emotions they shouldn't possess. With the help of Astro, a shooting star themed animatronic who's also a long-time friend, Levi uncovers the sinister truth behind the Emporium. These issues with the animatronics are a result of the founder Ezra Whitlock's tragic attempts to bring back his late wife.

As Levi navigates through unsettling encounters with the animatronics, mysterious sabotage, and the growing tension with the police force. He must confront not only the dark secrets of the Emporium but also his own fears and guilt from the past. With each discovery, Levi realizes that the line between man and machine, and friend and foe, is far more blurred than he ever imagined.

title: The Doe Identity
description:
When the spirit of a comatose man shows up in front of her, Alexis Howard is determined to help him find his identity. Little does she know, she's about to get sucked into a world of secrets, lies, and murder.

***

Alexis Howard can see the dead. A gift that has done her more harm than good. Having been forced to move into a strange small town because of it, Alexis vows to cut all contact with the world of the dead. It's easy at first, especially since there don't seem to be any ghosts in Casa Nova. That is until a comatose patient of hers shows up as one.

No, he's not dead. He's just semi-dead. And he has no idea who he is. Oh, and the police think he's a cold-blooded criminal who's involved in the disappearance of a 17-year-old girl.

Believing otherwise, Alexis decides to help the spirit find his identity and becomes embroiled in the search for the missing girl. Her investigation also leads to a meeting with a peculiar cat, who seems to be much older than she looks.

Just what exactly is the connection between the three? What kind of a cat gets shot and shows up without so much as a scratch a few days later? More importantly, who is John Doe?

title: You're Mine ( Not Edited )
description:
I watched as he searched through every single cabinet in the house.I  myself was still tied up.I took in a deep breath.

"Why are you doing this?"I asked making myself cry.
 
"Because I love you my love.You must pay for being a naughty girl."He said taking out a pocket knife.He came closer to my bare skin.He then traced the blade on my upper arm.

As he began to put pressure on the blade,pain began to pile up.


"Do you love him?" Did he mean Chris?

"Yes I do .Please let me goo." I began to plead.

"Wrong answer Doll Face."With that he began to  slice my arm.

I screamed in agony.He just stood there with that stupid smirk  of his .

He was enjoying every moment of it.

title: Daddy's Little Killer
description:
With a murderous secret and a dark history few but Helen Eriksson know, an uncertain path lies ahead of her. Helen's past, present and future are on a collision course with a sense of morality she wonders if she ever possessed.
  
  Her husband's corpse is barely cold, laid to rest under a shroud of suspicion directed at her by former peers at the FBI. Revenge boils in her veins against the one who shattered her perfect life, or the carefully constructed illusion of such. One thing Helen does not believe is that coincidences happen. So when an opportunity falls into her lap to slip through the web of the FBI investigation into her ex-husband's murder and darken the doorstep of the man she holds responsible for her professional ruin, Helen is hard pressed to resist the lure.
  
  Rather than arriving in Darkwater Bay anonymously, Helen walks with full knowledge into what she understands could be a trap sprung by her nemesis, Danny Datello. But the shield of a police detective's badge can't protect her from what she fears she has become by genetic birthright - a hardened murderer just like the father who shaped her into the woman she has become.
  
  What Helen doesn't count on is investment in anything but her own plot of revenge. To her surprise, the discovery of a body mere hours before her arrival in Darkwater Bay draws her into more than her own conflicted desires, but a corrupt city with its own secrets. Even more shocking is the realization that Helen craves more than Datello's punishment; justice for a dead victim.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I've been writing crime fiction since the 1990s, and published my first novel Daddy's Little Killer in 2012, ten years after its inception. I have written and published two series - the Eriksson (Darkwater Bay) series and the Raver/Castillo series. I've also published 2 standalone novels to date - The Quiet Ones and From Darkness to Death. All of my books are available through major ebook retailers (Barnes and Noble, iTunes, Kobo, Smashwords, Amazon).

title: Ansley (A stalking Love)
description:
Admiration could be good but when it involves obsession then things get ugly.

****

Ansley Cowden was a happy girl with looks to die for. And reason for him to notice her.

It started with messages by anonymous number, then phone calls, and then gifts. But being a carefree girl, she never paid attention to the things which seemed petty at the beginning turned colossal at  end, and her life upside down.

****

"For days, I couldn't feel anything but this constant craving, a craving that burns through me, a craving that sets me on fire, a craving that makes me ache for just one thing. And it's you, Ansley. You and only you. We'll be one soon. I'm coming. So don't you dare running away. Because you only belong to me. 
Your one and only love."

description:
2 years after the Wawanakwa Massacre, the famed Wawankwa Butcher is still on the loose. No one knows where, or who this man is, but a certain TV host no longer cares.

Blaineley Stacey Andrews O'Halloran announced the launch of her new hit show, Total Horror Island!

She and 13 campers, will travel to Wawanakwa, and participate in horror-themed challenges, and facing the judgment of their peers. At the end, one camper will stand victorious with cheap tabloid fame, and a 1,000,000 dollar fortune they'll blow in a week!

Unfortunately, the Wawanakwa Butcher was still on the island, and the spirits of his victims were not going be exploited.

Anger travels Blaineley, no matter where you turn...




You will pay for your sins.

Unofficial sequel to Eavery's island of the slaughter on TikTok. Inspiration comes from there.

title: My Incubus demon...
description:
Gabrielle is just a normal, teenage girl. She has many friends that care for her. A loving boyfriend that she can talk to. Parents that support her in her time of need. 
Well, that's what she wishes.

Everybody sees Gabrielle as that weird girl in class, sitting alone. They sneer at her and whisper to each other. Whispering in the corridor as she walks by. Nobody makes an effort with her, and she doesn't really mind. In fact, she'd probably do the same in their situation.

But all that changes when school starts. 
Will she be that weird girl? Or will she stand up for herself with the help of... her incubus demon

(An incubus is a demon in male form who, according to mythological and legendary traditions, lies upon sleepers, especially women, in order to engage in sexual activity with them. Its female counterpart is the succubus)

title: BEYOND THE DEAD ZONE | COMPLETE
description:
Eeros Wolfe-Brooks has never spent a moment of her life alone. In fact, overprotected by her mother Mira Brooks and father Sebastian Wolfe, Eeros has never spent a second off the Island of Paradise, and despite her requests to explore the dead zone, life is good. Humanity thrives despite the virus that ended the world over thirty years ago. 

Until the past Mira's been hiding from her daughter comes back and everything becomes threatened--supplies are running low, people are going missing and secrets are exposed. Even worse, there is a dark truth to what happened five years ago when a horrible accident struck the island and cost the live of Mira's first daughter. Now, Eeros wants to break free of the overbearing island life and get to the bottom of not only her mother's secrets but why a new evil now threatens not only their lives but their future too. 

In order to save the dead zone, Eeros and her friends will have to find out the truth of what's beyond all that they've know and hope it's not too late for all of humanity.

Update every Sunday ❤️

title: The Train of the Dead
description:
Michael is visiting Japan, his father's home country, but he feels left out. Not only can he not speak a sentence in Japanese, he doesn't resemble his family or anyone in the country whatsoever. Anyone who sees him can tell he's never been here before.
  
The only excitement he gets is when his family boards the shinkansen, the famous bullet train that's rumored to be the fastest in Japan. And that's the least frightening rumor. The others are much darker. Stories of people going missing near the train station. Especially the legend of the Teke Teke, the ghost who used to be a normal girl before meeting her demise by the shinkansen.
  
 At first, Michael brushes them off. They're just legends and rumors, after all.
  
But then, he sees how pale and eerie the passengers seem, how they lack any emotion or warmth in their pale faces and hollow eyes. The dark shadowy figure running along the tracks, fast enough to keep up with the train. And the terrifying sound that repeats in his head...
Domaine public

title: (CANCELLED) PLANTS VS ZOMBIES: ROOTS OF DESTINY
description:
This story has been cancelled. I'm working on a new PVZ story that will begin in the coming months, which addresses a lot of the issues I had with this story with a fresh set of characters. The remains of this story will stay up for historical reasons. If you'd like to know more about why I decided to cancel it, refer to the critical essay I wrote at the end of this story. Thank you for reading.

--------

Welcome to Neighborvillie! A strange, but wondrous town that is the home of the Plants that serve as the protectors for humans on earth with their strange, unexplainable powers. Many times, the Plants had protected the humans against the forces of zombies, but unfortunately they have once again returned. Due to a lack of forces, the L.E.A.F agency (The forces of plants that fight against the zombies) invite any plant with a mail box to join the war against the zombies. 

Specifically, three of these invitees are three friends: Rookie the Peashooter, Spooky the Fire Peashooter, and Dezda the Nightcap. Together, they decide to take the L.E.A.F exams to join the battle for Neighborvillie. What they don't know is that once they agree to join, their lives would never be quite the same...

title: The Inheritance
description:
Mike Harris thought his struggle with anxiety and sleep disturbances was behind him, but when the terrifying episodes of sleep paralysis return, they bring something darker-a presence lurking in the shadows, watching, waiting. As the haunting visions grow more vivid, Mike uncovers a horrifying truth: the curse tormenting him has haunted his family for generations.

Desperate for answers, Mike embarks on a journey into his family's past, discovering cryptic journals and the mysterious disappearance of a man named Abraham Dunn. What begins as a search for the origins of his nightmares soon leads him to a decaying house on the edge of town, where shadows flicker in the corners and whispers echo in the night.

With the help of his friend Sara, Mike unravels the chilling connection between his bloodline and a malevolent force sealed deep beneath the earth. But the shadows grow stronger, and the line between nightmare and reality begins to blur.

To save his sanity-and his life-Mike must confront the terrifying truth about "the source" and find a way to sever the curse. But some bonds are not so easily broken, and the darkness may be closer than he thinks.

title: My Wattpad Stalker(A Love to Die For)
description:
Everyone enjoys an  escape from reality every now and then.
For seventeen-year-old Belle Black, that escape has always been reading and writing. 
Upon encouragement from her English teacher, Belle joins a unique internet site that allows its users unlimited access to not only reading books but writing their own stories as well.
After she gains massive popularity on the site earning her a couple thousand followers, one particular user seems to have taken a keen interest in Belle herself.
Holding no fear over the mystery stranger, she doesn't give him or her a second thought when it comes to real life.

Only....The notes and the harassment doesn't stop at messages over Wattpad...
It progresses to mysterious phone calls, strange gifts, and this formerly only online stalker no longer seems to be just some stranger solely from the internet.

It's someone who'll stop at nothing to grasp Belle's full attention.
No matter who gets in the way.

description:
After thirteen years, Araromi Olamide returns to his hometown in Ibudun with his father, Biyi, and twin sister, Olamipo, to spend Christmas. 

 The experience takes a dramatic turn when he meets a beautiful new girl. Like most things, it starts out well... until it all begins to go horribly sour. 

Olamide gets into the kind of trouble he would have never imagined possible. The kind of trouble that has put his entire family at risk and will ruin their lives if care isn't taken.

Suddenly he gets an offer of help from a stranger. A stranger who could end up being either a guardian angel or the devil himself.

title: Hunting the frogmen 🐸
description:
An old society is dedicated to capturing and exposing nightmarish creatures. It was created when the first sightings of those beings were documented 200 years ago. The association is about to celebrate its bicentennial and a great event is being prepared for the special occasion.
Two ex-members are looking for a way to be welcomed again after their expulsion some months ago. The reason why they are expelled is referred multiple times but never explained.
They intend to travel towards an enchanted lake in the middle of the forest in search of a group of legendary creatures called the "frogmen" which they intend to capture and show at the event of the society's bicentennial. 
During their travel, they suffer multiple accidents but in the end, they manage to get into the frogmen's den and dissociate with them.
There they are told about the reality behind the association's origin and how it took over the world. 
After a lot of discussion which almost ends with them being eaten by crocodiles, it is decided they will help the frogmen destroy the society from within and free the region of their rule for a while.

authorBio:
Hello Folks!

Thanks for stopping by! If you like romance stories with humor, mystery, suspense, angst and a lot of love, you've come to the right place!
Please read them and let me know what you think.
My stories are spicy without being vulgar and mostly written in the third-person narrative (Yes, you read that right, it's your lucky day!).
I love reading historical fiction and romance stories and I love Wattpad and everything in Wattpad.
I usually respond to emails, so feel free to shoot one across, I love hearing from my readers.
I'm a reader first and a writer afterward, so I write whatever I want to read. So, if you enjoy my books, we have similar tastes in books. :)

Love,
S.
P.S: I should mention this, I love, love, love reading all comments on my stories. I read all comments every morning.
I should also mention, that you can hate and harp on my characters and my writing style all you like, but please keep your comments respectful and don't convert them into personal attacks on me.
I hope that isn't too much to ask! :)
To all my readers, a big hug n kiss!

title: Brain Dead; A Zodiac Story
description:
"Ooooh I'm coming to get you~" She playfully bit my shoulder and I freaked, screaming at the top of my lungs while swatting my hand at her face.

 "Don't scare me like that you ass!!" I snapped at her, before curling up into a ball and rocking back and forth.

Sag shuffled away from me and pouted, rubbing her nose as she silently apologized. I felt guilty for hitting her in the face, but I couldn't help it! I was freaking out about this, there was NO time to play games..

"Did you guys hear that..?" Taurus suddenly spoke through the darkness and I could see his soft brown eyes widening in concern.

"Haha, very funny Taur. I didn't think you'd stoop down to Sag's level." I spat back in a huff.

I could see his mouth open, as if he was about to respond, but he zipped it shut as a loud clang was suddenly heard from right outside the door.


----

A strange illness has been spreading across the city and country as a whole. Scientists haven't been able to determine what the disease actually is, but they're confident that it's contagious. 

They've been calling it the 'Blank' Virus, since side-effects have included people losing their minds and going mad; attacking people without hesitation and even killing them. Doctors and scientists have also reported that patients have seemed to be in a zombie-like daze, their brains completely dead but their bodies still moving.

It's completely unknown to how people contract the virus, but it's advised to treat any open wounds, as it may be a factor to how people have been contracting the virus. With the virus spreading through the air, there's not really a great chance of anyone surviving,

Unless someone finds a cure.

title: Headless Villainess
description:
Good afternoon, ladies and gentlemen.
  In the current world I am a selfish villainess that lived as she liked; in the previous world I lived modestly.
  The result of my self-centered, spoiled lifestyle was to be cheated on by my fiancee, the prince, who after conspiring with his lover, broke off his engagement with me and as the result of a strict trial, my execution was decided. And thankfully as a noble I received an 'honorable' death by guillotine.
  And so, after I was decapitated by the guillotine, I was reborn into a corpse...
  Re"born"?
  No wait, I don't even have a head, what are you telling me to do now?

(Update, 2020)

Heya! Ella here! It's been a while since I used this site, but after my main platform, Deviantart was massively downgraded by its new format, I've decided to start posting on here a bit more again, so stay tuned for some new stories! ^_^

Basically, I started this account when I was 14 because back then I was right on board the whole giant/tiny bandwagon and wanted to contribute my own works. Luckily for you guys, the only thing that's changed in the last seven years is that I'm now 21 and would like to think my writing style has greatly improved since then!

Alas, before I get your hopes up, I am also now a uni student studying psychology, so it might be slow going getting back into writing on here, but bear with me!

title: FrankenSlime
description:
Detective Erin Halstead thought she was investigating an isolated murder. Now, she's thrust into a race against time to uncover the origins of a living, evolving organism that excretes deadly toxins, grows faster than wildfire, and defies every attempt to destroy it. As the slime spreads across the coast, devouring ecosystems and igniting public panic, humanity faces an unimaginable question: how do you stop something that only grows stronger with every passing moment?

From the lab to the ocean's depths, from the Salk Institute to the halls of power, Halstead must navigate a web of secrets, conspiracies, and scientific hubris to find answers-before the world itself succumbs to the bloom of death.

title: The Fall of the Fainthearts
description:
In the Empire Stadium, 1993, London Revival would perform together for the last time. The world knew them as the most influential band of the decade, but they knew each other as lovers, friends and most importantly; family. You've heard the interviews but have never seen the full picture. Until now, frontman Axel Faintheart has refused to talk about the fateful night that ended his career.

What really happened to the late Jade Cash? Was it really his fault? Or was somebody else responsible for her death? Tonight, we get the answers you've been waiting for.

'The Fall of the Fainthearts' explores the 90s music scene through a documentary lens. Contains strong language and mentions of drug use. Tackles addiction issues and withdrawal. Viewer discretion is advised.

This book is still to be edited and refined.


#1 in #WhoDidIt
#3 in Documentary

title: Cowboy Defender{Cowboy Protecter 5}
description:
After getting in an accident with her twin Angel runs from her family. Three years later she hasn't seen or talked to them because she blames herself for getting her sister hurt. Working as an informant for the FBI she is given a partner when she is attacked by a killer that she'd been following. 
  
  After watching his family being murdered and not being able to save them Jack has sworn off all commitment except his job. When a case lands on his desk he will do whatever he can to bring the killer down even if it means putting up with a woman that drives him crazy. But when she is attacked he realizes there may be more to the woman.

_______________

title: The Bodies One By One
description:
When a body is found out near a theme park, Storm Fernald must start the journey on finding the killer. But more bodies begin to show, all sporting the same injuries, Fernald realizes that he needs to work fast.
Who are these victims? 
Were they innocent? 
Were they connected in some of way?
Fernald later finds that there are two people who can answer all the questions, he just needs to find them.
What Fernald doesn't know, is that someone else is after them too, but they want them dead.

title: After School
description:
Paranormal activity occurring in the hallways. Haunted classrooms. Creepy washrooms. Mysterious forces. Strange happenings. That is the type of school they go to.  And that is the type of school they will have to escape.

~ When transfer student, Yuta, starts his grade 11 year at Willesden high school, everything seems normal at first. The American school is different from what he is used to, but it is a shift he can adjust to. That is, until one day, he and his homeroom classmates are locked in, after school- with no way of escaping. They realize that the paranormal activity that has been occurring to them since September 3, 1946, wasn't a dream.

This unlikely group of students must unite and fight against their fears, to escape and erase the curse of their school. But why is this happening to them? And who is the one purposely causing their turmoil?

This is the story of a boy who had been wrongfully gifted the powers of a witch and of a 200-year-old man who covers his face with a human mask.

title: The Minotaur
description:
Being a thousand-year old vampire does have its perks: like immunity to sunlight, or the ability to transform into smoke or a giant winged bat, or just downright being the oldest person around. But Michael Holger doesn't care about any of that. After a millennium of existence like his, all Michael wants to do is enjoy the peace and quiet that comes with the small backwater town of West Harbour he just retired into. Unfortunately, a sinister game has been set in motion with the ancient vampire himself right at the very centre of it. The clock is ticking, the bodies piling, and the sanity of a sleepy little town about to be thrown off the edge of a cliff. But then again, isn't that just a life particular to one they call the Minotaur?

Book 1 in the 'Mikael Chronicles' series

title: Fake Daughter Live On Farming In Countryside
description:
As a fake daughter, Bai Xue, a master cultivator of immortality, went to the relevant institution to change her surname to Chu Xue on the day she learned the truth about her life experience. The next day, he transferred 100 million yuan to his father who had supported him for many years, and ran to the deep mountains and old forests where his biological parents lived. The dirty air in the city is not suitable for cultivating immortals, but the deep mountains and old forests are suitable for me!  Chu Xue originally wanted to peacefully cultivate an immortal in the Dharma-ending era and raise chickens, although she regretted that her spiritual energy was thin and missed the way.
　　But I didn't expect that one day the live broadcast system was accidentally awakened. As long as the popularity is high enough, you can draw a lottery for bronze, silver, and gold grades , and get all kinds of good things.
  　Not long after, netizens discovered a fairy in wide-sleeved Hanfu. She lives in the deep mountains, raises cats and dogs, touches fish and eats chickens, grows spiritual trees, and plays the guqin. She is absolutely beautiful!
　　The point is, she can actually treat cancer with traditional Chinese medicine, and she can also float on the water with qinggong. The real daughter Bai Shanshan used the resources of the Bai family to enter the entertainment circle and participated in the variety show "Mountain Village Life."
　　I deliberately came to the Hundred Thousand Mountains where the fake daughter was, and I wanted to pretend to be a slap in the face
　　After returning home and make fun of it.
　　Unexpectedly, the fans shouted: "Fuck, Shanshan, you have met a land fairy, hurry up and pay your respects!"

　　Bai Shanshan:? ? ? There is a sentence that I don't know if I should say it or not. Whose fans are you?

authorBio:
Hi! I'm a hobbyist writer who enjoys writing damsel in distress themed stories. I do, however, try to add some plot and character arcs to the stories so it's not just a girl tied up and struggling for 5000 words.
My main series, Becky and the Manchester Snoops, is about a girl reporter named Becky who is trying to build a case against Italian crime boss Marta Alfonsi. It's a game of cat and mouse between the two, and an ongoing series. I also have some fanfic and original fantasy/sci-fi. If these types of short stories interest you, stay and read one and let me know what you think, I really love reader's feedback :)

Here's my main webpage where I'm most active with these kinds of stories and art https://www.deviantart.com/scottgrisham

title: Sick Intentions
description:
Piercen Hamilton is his name and he has been calling this two bedroom house his home his whole life. He inherited the place from his parents when they died on his eighteenth birthday. A tragic car accident leaving him with their money. He isn't poor from their wealth they left behind and his late father's construction business he took over. But despite the steady income from the bussiness he continues to rent out the room downstairs.

Living alone here would be lonely to most in the redwoods and lonesomeness is part of the reason. Company, affection, love but not the money. Murder, rape, a perfect forced romance between him and another is more like it. 

When a young couple first arrive at the house Piercen appeared and sounded harmless. All was a lie to get them inside. See he hadn't intended to rent to two people. He prefers one girl, less the mess to clean up. Two is a bigger risk he is taking on but the moment he saw Helen he knew he wanted her.

authorBio:
I love reading and writing more than anything. Most of the stories I write and post on wattpad are boyxboy stories and contain male pregnancy... I'd really love to write a book with someone on wattpad. Maybe one day..

I want to say thank you to everyone who has followed me or voted and commented for any of my stories I post here. Especially The Gift which took what felt like forever to finish. You stuck by and enjoyed it even though I doubted it every time I pressed the publish button.

I never imagined so many people would ever enjoy anything to come from me. It means a lot to me. The book started from a dream and went from  there. Good news is I'm writing book two Rebuild, Repair, Then Comes Revenge slowly right now in three parts as I finish a few other stories I placed on hold. I'm excited and happy because I have so many plans and ideas that I can't wait for everyone to read it.

Um.. in other news Fulls Bloods is still on hold and the other stories I promised to start posting like The Nightmare Continues which I plan to get back to posting new chapters since I took it down months ago along with a few other stories. But I think I'm going to edit them and change a lot of things. I have a lot of stories half completed I want to finish and post. Hopefully I will soon.

Anyway I hope everyone enjoys my stories.  :)

title: Zomb-Pocalypse 3
description:
Book 3

***Spoiler Alert: This book description contains spoilers, if you have not read Zomb-Pocalypse 1 & 2, reading this description will ruin a huge plot twist in the first two books.***


Jane has found the cabin, her best friend Abby, and most surprisingly, her parents-but now the hard part begins.

For over a month, Jane has survived on the road amid flesh eating monsters with no one to tell her what to do, but now she has her parents hovering over her, stifling her every movement. They want to treat her like their little girl, but the Apocalypse has forced her to grow up in so many ways that she just cannot go back.

Surviving day to day on the road was hard, but building a life for themselves will be an even bigger challenge. Winter is starting to settle in, faster every day, and the group finds themselves in a life or death race to gather food and ensure the safety of the cabin from dead that seem to pop up everywhere. Nothing is truly safe.

Hard lessons are learned through deadly mistakes, friendships are strained to their near breaking point, and it could all be for nothing ...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone, I am 34 years old, and I live in Alberta Canada. I have an awesome boyfriend, two kids, am a personal lines insurance broker, and I sometimes try to be an aspiring author in my spare time. I love reading Regency Romances, Paranormal, and Zombies!! A few  years ago I got the bright idea to do a Regency Romance mash up with Zombies, and Duke of the Undead was born (available on Wattpad). I took a break from writing for a couple years, but really want to get back to it! My hobbies include writing, reading, gardening, camping, and running around for my kids.
My completed and edited Zomb-Pocalypse series is available free to read through Kindle Unlimited on Amazon as well.
Thanks for checking out my profile!

title: Becoming Them: A Zombie Novel
description:
What would you do if one second you were struggling to survive with your friends and mother in tow, and then you wake up to find yourself with a group of strangers the next - all during the country's takeover of blood-thirsty zeds? 

     Megan couldn't believe her eyes. Her brain was muddled with confusion she couldn't get rid of, no matter how many times those strangers reassured her and explained what happened. But she had to accept it, even though it didn't make any sense to her. Megan had been with her mother every step of the way since everything turned to chaos, beginning just a year before, and now she was nowhere to be seen. 

     And on top of that, she had the zeds to deal with. Ghastly creatures that used to be human, carrying a virus that's spread through a constant hunger for flesh from the host, spreading through bites and scratches. It didn't exactly make it easy to prevent getting infected. 

     Things could have been worse, though, Megan thought. She could've been left all alone to ponder over her thoughts and fear over the future. 

     It'll only be within the time spent with the new group will she find out that everything's not as happy and welcoming as it had seemed. These people had a few secrets of their own, including the real reason they took Megan in. She would soon find out just how far people would go to ensure their own survival.

--------------
Please check out my first finished novel. Hope you enjoy this zombie story and let me know what you think in the comments! x

title: After Surviving The Apocalypse, I Built A City In Another World
description:
[Congratulations, Terranian survivor #99598, for activating the Universe Assistance System!]

Althea, along with the remaining 1% of the population of their home planet, stared at the holographic screen in front of them in confusion.

Their galaxy was apparently ending, and suddenly announcements from an alien system appeared in their heads, telling them they would be permanently transfered to another world.

The survivors were all very depressed. First they were forced to survive in a zombie apocalypse, and now they had to survive a new world altogether? 

It just so happened that Althea was one of the few people who got the Lord Token, the ticket to controlling a territory---a supposed safe haven for her people. 

Althea looked at her very large stomach and sighed at an unknown future.

Would she be able to build a good home for her children and fellowmen? 

And... would she and her husband find each other again after this disaster?
___

title: Kill Who You Want
description:
What if it came to the starkest of all choices: kill, or else suffer the loss of a loved one?

Readers' comments: 'simply the best', 'one of the best books I've read', 'loved it', 'amazing', 'great reading', 'stumped me to the very end' and others

Plot: When a pregnant doctor is brutally murdered in her own kitchen, the husband claims to have some weeks earlier received an anonymous and darkly menacing letter. For the small town of Ravensby, it's just the start of a living nightmare - one in which nobody is spared from the murderous cross hairs, and which will drive Detective Inspector Kubič to the edge of his own sanity...

Genre: suspense/thriller

Status: completed

Length: 70,000 words (approx. 275 standard novel pages)

Target readership: Though aimed primarily at adults, the novel features several teenage characters and so may also appeal to a younger audience

Extract:

 "Warn you sir, not a pretty sight in there."

Kubič took a deep, preparatory breath, his footsteps slow and leaden as he moved towards the kitchen door. Not for the first time over the years, he found himself wishing he'd chosen an entirely different sort of career. Paper-pushing, something out of doors. Anything at all. He'd always been reasonable enough at woodwork back at school, he recalled. Why hadn't he done that, he thought? Become a cabinet maker or some damn thing.

A reluctant hand pushed open the door...

"Oh dear Christ."

The words escaped his mouth forcefully, involuntarily, like blood gushing from an open wound
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Wattys 2020 winner (The Painted Altar, literary fiction)

(Please note I don't do read-for-reads, vote-for-votes or follow-for-follows. Only follow me if you genuinely like my work and wish to be updated on future projects.)

Hi, I'm a 50-year-old English teacher originally from England, but now settled in Italy. Creative writing's been my passion since I was old enough to hold a pen straight.

I'm a mystery/thriller writer who deals in twisty, suspenseful plots and psychological depth. My target readership is principally adult, and my literary ambitions lie in traditional publishing.

I have five novels on the site. The most recent, entitled The Trail Killer, revolves around the wrongful arrest of an Indian immigrant for the murders of two young women on a hiking trail. Explored themes include racial prejudice and gender inequality.

The Scent of Death is meanwhile about a cadaver dog handler. After uncovering the remains of a missing child, and unconvinced by the direction of official police investigations, she resolves to unravel the mystery herself.

My Wattys award-winning novel, The Painted Altar, mixes the historical element of the Second World War, and revolves around two interconnected murders, 64 years apart.

My Wattpad debut is an edgy thriller entitled Kill Who You Want, in which a small town is terrorised by a series of darkly menacing letters.

The final of my novels, The Third Shadow, is about a British detective who retires to southern Italy and becomes involved with carabinieri investigations into a case of two missing tourists.

Though the mechanisms of Wattpad may be at the disadvantage of adult/semi-literary writers like myself, I am nonetheless immensely grateful to the site for two reasons:
1) The week-to-week motivation it gives me to keep churning out those chapters and thus build up a body of work.
2) The possibilty to interact with a (relatively) small but (I hope) appreciative readership whose feedback will help me hone my craft.

authorBio:
I am a 26 year old Freelance graphic artist who works for a Toyota/Chevy dealership. I live in Moses Lake, Washington with my dog, Oreo. I am originally from a tiny two-stoplight town called Edgewood in my home state of New Mexico.

I've been writing since I can remember. I used to use roleplaying on a program called Furcadia to hone my writing skills. A lot of my works are fantasy in nature, with subjects ranging from shapeshifters to fallen angels. Currently I have roughly 18 running stories, though none of them are finished except the first draft of Lycans and Zombies (which has been renamed "Blood" for the next rendition).

She goes to her new high school and meets this guy named Drake. He seems to care alot about her and she just doesn't understand why.

Hayley starts having these weird dreams about some kind of angel with no face, but soon goes to bed and sees it right in her room, but yet again with no face.

Will she ever find out who it really is?

title: Lost in Blue
description:
On an early Monday morning in Germany, Sankt Goarhausen's police department finds itself in a peculiar position as several policemen visit the site at the Rhine. Among them, 25-year old Henning Dorn is tasked to investigate the case of the salvage team's strange discovery: an unscathed coffin containing two bodies. 

As he opens the coffin to take a look, Dorn is severely surprised at its contents, setting him onto the path to uncover Sankt Goarshausen's mysteries.

Was it murder? Suicide? 

Or is the truth hidden beneath the Rhine's waters?

| Status: Completed | Language: English (few German words) | Genre: Mystery | Each Chapter length: ~ 1500 - ~ 2500 words

title: Project Terminar
description:
(Book Two of Experiment Number 7218. Do not read this summary or book if you have not read Book One)

I listen closely through the static on the radio, trying to hear the emergency broadcasting message. An electronic voice repeated over and over, "This message is transmitted to you through the North Carolina Police Department. It is advised to stay indoors and to remain inside if at all possible. Have enough food for one to two weeks. Do not come in contact with anyone outside of your household. This message is transmitted to you through the North Carolina Police Department." I scoff to myself. I know this will not be over in a mere two weeks.

- - - - -

Terminar; The Latin word for Terminate. Definition: To bring to an end. 

Brittany Slater was free. She had finally escaped the island that she now calls Hell. But there were so many loose ends. Why had her father destroyed all of his research? His factory? His life's work? Why had he given her a chance to live? Well, she got her answer.
 
Upon arriving to North Carolina, she was thrown right back into Hell on Earth. Grounders, Savages, what were once innocent people, they now all roam free. 

Her father told her the Experiment was over, and he was right. It was time for the Project to begin. To take effect. And no one could stop him. He'd turned the world into a pyramid, and he put himself and his own government on top. 

He'd activated Project Terminar.

Warning: Contains graphic content such as blood, gore, violence, and language. Please take notice of the horror tag. Some content may not be suitable for all readers. Thank you.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Branded To Him (On Hold)
description:
I froze; the guard yelled, telling me to get a move on. The unearthly screeching sent all of us into shock, soon turning into fear. Some cried the moment they reached the door. I didn't know what was coming, but it'd be painful.
“Next!” I was two kids away from the cold metal plated door. I closed my eyes, hearing a scream from behind the door. The girl in front of me started to cry.
“Shut up!” A guard yelled, slapping her cheek. My eyes widened and I forced myself to swallow tears that threatened to fall.
“Next!” My sore bare feet scraped across the dark tiled floor as I made my way forward while the next child went in. I wouldn't survive a slap to the cheek, no matter how strong I looked.
“Next!” The girl in front of me quivered and shook, her fear obvious. I cringed away from the door as a laugh echoed in the next room.
“Stand up straight!” The guard yelled at me. I didn't dare look him in the eyes, knowing I'd be hit like the last child that stared at him.
“Next!” My skin crawled as the door opened...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello there,
My name's Rue Varron. I'm a writer and hope to eventually publish one of my books when I finish them.
I love music and I'm always looking for suggestions of new stuff to listen to. I'm not too partial to classical, but will listen to it once in a blue moon. Otherwise, I listen to pretty much anything.

Umm, I'll have to re-update the rest of this later. :P Sorry.

I just want to thank every single one of my fans for being so supportive by voting, commenting, even just talking to me. You guys help me get motivated to write the next chapter in my stories and I couldn't do it without you guys. <3 I love each and every one of you (not in a creepy stalker-like way).

title: Race to Refuge
description:
When the world crumbles around you, how do you keep hope alive?

Mallory, escaping a damaging relationship, struggles to navigate a chaotic world...where a viral outbreak turns helpless victims into ruthless zombies.

Ty, who's only recently gotten his driver's permit, is abruptly thrust into adulthood as he desperately seeks to save his young sister. He makes a fast friend in a German shepherd yearning for companionship and love in this new, dangerous world.

Charlie, restlessly searching for meaning in his life, learns meaning is elusive during an apocalypse. Tremendous obstacles provide him with new self-discoveries.

If they can escape the constant peril and find refuge, can they forge a new life from the ruins of the old one?

"Race to Refuge" rivets readers with mild thrills in a novel that's not about the zombies...but about the people striving for elusive shelter and a future of hope.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

title: Glass Eye: Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective
description:
Season 1 of Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective

* Her psychic powers are fake, but the kidnapped girl she must find is real. *
    
Zandra is an infamous "psychic" who grifts the gullible residents of her small Wisconsin town using her wits, not anything supernatural. Her skills are put to the ultimate test when the police tap her to help find a kidnapped girl.
    
    But there's a catch. The girl's father apparently got away with murdering Zandra's husband years ago. 
    
    Can Zandra put aside her grudge for the sake of a missing child? Or is this the perfect opportunity for revenge?

Also available on YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family.

title: The Happy Zombie Sunrise Home
description:
Okie's fifteen. She lives in New York. She's got a few problems: she's failing geography, her dad's a wimp, and her mother, Sumatra, is a stone cold bitch. But things get a lot worse when Sumatra turns into a zombie and eats Okie's dad.

Clio, Okie's grandmother, lives in Toronto; but since the zombie apocalypse, Toronto's a lot further away than it used to be. Clio suggests that Okie transport Sumatra across the border, because family is family. But coaching Okie by cellphone isn't easy, and Clio has some zombies of her own to contend with. Luckily she has some garden tools.

Naomi Alderman and Margaret Atwood team up for this unusual two-hander. Encompassing love, death, sex, and the meaning of family, The Happy Zombie Sunrise Home will surprise, delight, and convince you of the vital importance of keeping ready supplies of rhubarb and mini-wieners in your freezer at all times.

The story unfolds beginning October 24.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Godzilla 3: Rise Of Cthulhu
description:
DISCLAIMER: I DO NOT OWN GODZILLA! I ONLY OWN THE STORY!

1 year has slipped by since the tumultuous upheaval in Hong Kong, where Godzilla's fleeting presence momentarily restored a delicate balance. The world, still mending, now quakes as fresh seismic disturbances shatter the uneasy peace. The haunting echoes of monstrous roars and colossal shadows have dimmed, yet Monarch faces bizarre phenomena surfacing from the abyss-something immense, powerful, and incomprehensible. What was once a mere legend has morphed into a chilling reality: Cthulhu has risen! This ancient entity, once relegated to folklore, has emerged from the sunken ruins of R'lyeh, unleashing chaos across the globe. Ominous skies and turbulent seas signal the arrival of this cosmic horror, its influence spreading like a contagion to all who dare gaze into the abyss. Titans worldwide are seized by terror, their instincts igniting a primal panic. Godzilla, once the symbol of balance, now confronts a force that shatters the natural order. Other kaiju resonate with this collective fear, bracing for a confrontation that could seal the fate of the planet. As cities brace for the impending storm, humanity stands at a pivotal juncture: will we unite against a common threat, or will our divisions lead to our demise? An atmosphere of dread hangs heavy, nations casting suspicious glances at one another as leaders grapple with decisions that could either forge alliances or deepen rifts. Amidst this chaos, ordinary people find themselves thrust into extraordinary situations. Scientists scramble to unravel this emergence, while military forces prepare for a potential clash that could mean either destruction or salvation. Communities band together, pooling resources and knowledge, realizing that their survival depends on unity rather than discord. As the monumental clash between ancient forces and modern society looms, the vital question remains: will we stand united, or fall prey to chaos and division?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: My sole purpose is to captivate and amuse you! Cast your votes, share your thoughts, or hit that follow button. Until next time, FOXTROTDESTROYER OUT!

title: My Adventures at Zak Bagan's Haunted Museum
description:
This is a story of real events I experienced through different visits to Zak Bagan's Haunted Museum.  I'm telling it through the lens of two fictional characters to better understand what happened, and to make it more of an experience for the reader. 

I have become obsessed with the museum, and I'm not sure why. It could be the macabre items on display, or the fact Zak Bagans owns them, or the experiences I've had in the museum itself. But writing it all down to share with others seems like a way to embrace the weird things that have happened, and maybe see if there are others that feel the same way. Feel free to comment about your experiences, questions, or other comments. 

I found out the Haunted Museum isn't a joke or an average spooky, haunted house adventure. My first visit was in Dec. 2017, and my last was in December 2022. I've been on the new VIP tour and Flashlight tour, where you get to paranormal investigate the museum. I will be adding those experiences in a noted separate tour as part of the story. I will keep going back and adding more experiences. But then, don't wait for me. Go yourself. It's worth the trip.

If you are interested in Zak Bagan's and his Haunted Museum, this story will give you an idea of what the tours are like, what is in the museum, and what to expect with a visit. But there is also a fallout from a visit there, like attachments, dreams, and experiences especially if you are sensitive. Find this all out by this account of what it's like to visit the museum.

***Many of the characters are fictional except for Zak Bagans, that owns the museum. Whenever possible, real pictures of the museum are included that I took. I also run the FB fan group for the museum. Look for it on Facebook. Enjoy!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Marilyn is a paranormal romance novelist. She enjoys the characters that just don't fit in. From witches to time traveling researchers, she is letting her imagination soar to explore new worlds and write all the details down. Marilyn has traveled to Paris, Amsterdam, London, Sydney, and Munich. She loves to include these in her settings as much as can allow. Best of all is letting her reader enjoy them through the perspective of a character. She currently lives in Northern California with her husband.
