title: Down Under
description:
|WATTYS 2022 WINNER - HORROR|

Shawn, a convicted criminal, never thought she'd see the sun again, let alone call another star system her home. When she's offered an out from her prison sentence, she embarks on a dangerous interstellar expedition along with 18 of Earth's most intelligent criminals.

Their task is to set up a base on a supposedly habitable planet and prepare it for colonization. Although the planet has liquid water and a breathable atmosphere, it is believed to host only microbial life. However, upon arriving, Shawn and the rest of the colonists learn that assumption was grossly incorrect.

In a brutal attack from rampaging wildlife, everyone but Shawn and four other colonists are killed. The five survivors retreat to the cavernous network beneath the ground seeking safety, but they soon come to a terrible discovery. These caves aren't ordinary caves, and they are no safer down under than they were on the surface.

[][][]

This was originally my entry for the 2021 Open Novella Contest, and it received an honorable mention! It has now been expanded into a full length novel. I used prompt number 53:

"When wildlife starts rampaging, all the humans are forced underground. However, they come to a terrible discovery that being underground is no safer than being on the surface."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
An engineer who designs ships. 2018, 2019, 2021 and 2022 Wattys Winner, 2022 Ambys Winner, 2023 Wattys Shortlister, Wattpad Originals author, and former Wattpad Creator/Star.

My current story, Mezzanine, is a teen horror/thriller series with a dash of romance, a hint of humor and ton of mystery. New chapters will release weekly on Wattpad and YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family.

I grew up in a suburban town in New Jersey where my friends and I spent most of our free time hunting for ghosts and trying to find the scariest horror movies.

I attended college at a very small school in New York (that looks remarkably like Wayne Manor) where I majored in Naval Architecture and Marine Engineering. I am now living in Seattle, Washington working as a naval architect.

In my free time, I enjoy hiking, live music, skiing, and of course reading and writing. I'm particularly interested in horror, paranormal, mysteries, and thrillers. A new English teacher is introduced to an all-boys school that is known for its ancient traditions and high standards. He uses unorthodox methods to reach out to his students, who face enormous pressure from their parents and the school. With Keating's help, students Neil Perry, Todd Anderson, y/n Murphy, and others learn to break out of their shells, pursue their dreams and seize the day. 

Y/n Murphy is known to have been quite timid her whole life. She's always had a fear of speaking to others but will speak up for the people she cares about in a given situation.  When y/n is allowed into Welton the life she's used to suddenly changes. When she's introduced to a group of boys she feels misplaced at first but one boy catches her eye. The adorable awkward Gerard Pitts. With the help of her new friends and charismatic English teacher, she learns how to open up to others and 'seize the day. But will she be able to come face to face with her feelings or will she keep them hidden forever?

title: Death's Apprentice
description:
*Completed*
  
  He wasn't an angel, he wasn't a saint, so why was he standing in front of Ardia, and why did he know her name?
  
  Ardia was a normal girl, living life as any seventeen year old would, until she died. Wandering through the streets of the city she once called home, someone starts following her. The mysterious stranger, a man known as Death, makes her an offer she can't turn down, quite literally.
  
  Forced to become Death's Apprentice, Ardia finds herself trapped in a world of angels, demons, and everything in between. Things aren't bad, they aren't great either, until she discovers that being part of Death's realm comes with a whole slew of problems: the devil breaking in, grudges between Death and the archangels, the possibility of platypus sitting, and, of course, reaping the souls of her fellow mortals. Something complicated further when Death's scythe is stolen.
  
  Highest ranking: #1 in angels and demons
  
  Word count: 80,000

title: Let Me In HALLOWEEN SPECIAL
description:
Some horrors are meant to stay buried...

At a remote Antarctic research station, Zara Smith is hearing voices.

As she struggles to hide her worsening madness from her crewmates, mysterious incidents begin to plague their expedition: their equipment is sabotaged and communications severed.

Paranoia infects the team, and someone-- or something-- is picking them off, one by one.

But as the line between reality and nightmare blurs, the true danger lies not in the frozen depths of Antarctica, but within the darkest corners of Zara's own mind.

This is a completed story that will be updated daily.

If you enjoy Freida McFadden and Noelle West Ihli, then you'll love this haunting thriller set in the terrifying isolation of the Antarctic!

description:
Inspired by a both book and movie called Coraline, Sam, his husband Guy, and their Chickeraffe Mr Jenkins moved to the Pink Palace where it has two neighbors. The neighbors from upstairs are the fox, mouse, and the goat. The other neighbors from downstairs is a overprotective mother with a daughter. Sam the explorer was so bored and tired of living in a boring house and he had a serious problem with his husband too. Until one night, Sam discovered a secret door that leads to the other world where everything is so wonderful and fun. He also met the boss of the other world who is quite fond of him. The neighbors, the BADGUYS, and Sam's new friend was warning Sam not to go through the small door because of danger is lurking ready to catch its prey. As soon Sam finds out that everything is a nightmare, can he get away from that evil spider boss before he becomes the new victim and have his soul taken and gets eaten?

Be careful what you wish for.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Suffer the Little Children
description:
Simon Fuller and his daughters Fey and Rebecca are a perfect family, doing their best to recover from the death of Simon's wife.  One day, Rebecca introduces Simon to her imaginary friend, Nathaniel.  She tells her father he can keep Nathaniel 'forever'.

Then the phone appears.  Then the lies begin.  And the pain.

Simon tries to discover who Nathaniel is and Rebecca tells him the imaginary boy prefers to be known by his nickname, 'Mr. Boogie'...

-

Commissioned by Wattpad and Universal for the release of the movie 'Sinister 2', Suffer the Little Children is described as 'genuinely terrifying'!

title: Hostel M2
description:
[Selected by @UniversalHorror ]

One haunted hostel, two college students on the run, one DEAD man.

When college freshmen Chris and Henry get caught up in the tracks of a wandering ghost haunting their hostel, the only thing they could wish for is that it's all a dream-but it isn't. Bloody trails are left, cold bodies pile up and the question of "who's next?" keeps the two friends on their heels, running away from unseen things.

With the help of their Professor and a priest, they try to unravel the mystery and put an end to the menace but the web gets thicker and even more lives are put at risk.

"It's inevitable, [...] our end seems certain."

title: My Soul To Take
description:
To escape the dangers of wartime London, Millie has been sent away to Wickford Hall, but what lurks there is far more sinister than anything war might bring.

---

THERE'S SOMETHING WICKED STALKING WICKFORD HALL...

As war rages on, Mildred Cunningham is sent from the battered streets of London to the remote Wickford Hall, an old manor house turned school far in the country. She may be safe from the bombs of The Blitz, but Mildred--or Millie as she prefers--is miserable. She misses her old life, her friends, her family. She would rather risk German invasion than suffer the presence of the unfriendly nuns that run Wickford or the other strangely hostile students.

But when new girl Petra arrives and befriends her, Millie thinks that Wickford might be survivable... As long as she has someone by her side. Only it soon becomes clear that Wickford is not the safe haven they expected. Girls begin to die, and Millie soon realizes that something sinister stalks the halls of Wickford.

Isolated and afraid, Millie must discover the secrets of Wickford or be lost to its halls forever.

---

ABOUT ME
=========
Telling stories is something I've always done, but until recently, they took the form of comics or illustrations. While I have dabbled in short fiction before, NaNoWriMo 2009 was the first time I managed to finish an entire novel. Writing that first book seemed to spark something in me, and I've kept writing ever since. Funny where life takes you, huh?

Christmas goblin alter-ego @ChristmasRomance

COMMENTING & READING POLICY
============================
Please don't ask me to read your stories. I wish I could, but I get too many requests to make any promises. I do try to check out everyone who comments, but I'm a lurker by nature. 👻 Advertising, however, is just rude. And also against Wattpad guidelines. Don't.

COVER DESIGN
============
All illustrations and designs are my own. I am not taking requests or commissions, sorry.

title: Vendetta-Thirst for Justice
description:
A tale of shadows and secrets, Vendetta delves into the chilling underworld of crime, deception, and the relentless pursuit of justice. When a group of friends uncovers eerie connections between Deaths, an abandoned house, and a sinister network of criminals, they are thrust into a dangerous game where every revelation brings them closer to peril.

The word vendetta traditionally signifies revenge for a family member, but in this story, the group's bond transcends blood ties. To them, the world itself is a family-one they will fight for, no matter the cost.

Bound by a shared thirst for justice and haunted by the echoes of betrayal, they must navigate a web of lies spun by those they once trusted. As the truth inches closer, so does the risk of losing everything. Vendetta is not just a fight for justice-it's a battle against time, corruption, and the darkest corners of humanity.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: ALIVE: The Aftermath Chronicles (Book 1)
description:
(Currently being edited & Extended)
☠ TWICE FEATURED ON WATTPAD!
☠ "Viral Reads" list pick on WattZombie. 

A woman with rare immunity and an AWOL troubled soldier struggle to keep her secret from those who would exploit her in a tyrannical, zombie-ridden world.

As the colony they seek refuge in keeps the dead at bay, other survivor groups ready to fight those within for the last remaining safe territories in the south.

A disturbing cult moves in, lead by a serial killer from the old world. His distorted religious beliefs and those of his followers claim him as the savior of the new world, where only the purest of souls are deemed to live under his reign.

Another group of mismatched survivors harbors a school-shooting survivor who will stop at nothing to ensure her friends see the next sunrise. Their own leader, an exile from the colony, seeks his revenge on the colony's current barbaric ruler, Russell Wolfe, and to take all he holds dear.

As allies and enemies shift and form, only one thing is certain-the dead are coming for them all. 

☣☣☣☣☣☣

This is book one of an ongoing series.

authorBio:
I'm a Wattpad Creator and a Wattpad Ambassador which keeps me plenty busy! I challenge myself to write novels in different genres, and I enjoy reading all genres. About my writing style:

+ Romantic encounters in my stories are of the fade-to-black variety.

+ Scenes of graphic violence are limited and mostly used as a special effect rather than the norm.

+ Traditional gender roles.

+ Staunch defender of the serial comma.

Many people have helped me over the years to learn the writing craft. I consider helping others as a way of giving back. I'll read and comment on other Wattpad author's books (as time permits) as long as the story holds my interest.

My writing memberships include: Pennwriters, Greater Lehigh Valley Writers Group, and Perry County Council of the Arts.

title: Remember Me This Way
description:
“Please! You have to help me! I don’t know what the hell is happening to me!” 
“Cassie…don’t you remember what happened?”
“What are you talking about?”
“Cassie…you died eight months ago…”

It was a well-known fact around the small town of Clorville that Cassie Chambers and Tate Coleman didn’t get along. After years of bullying, nasty pranks and constant harassment, it was safe to say that both Cassie and Tate despised each other – but after Cassie dies, it seems Tate is the only one who can see her ghost. 

Cassie’s death is closed case, but is that all there is to it? 
Trying to deal with his own demons, Tate has to try and help his high school enemy, because if he’s the only one who can see her, he’s the only one who can help her move on. 
When Tate begins to develop feelings for Cassie, it can only end one way, but will he love her enough to help her find the truth? Or will he be selfish enough to keep it to himself, just to see her beautiful face every day?

They say the truth will set some free, and maybe that’s the case but will Tate’s feelings get in the way of giving Cassie the one thing she wants most, 
Freedom?
Tous Droits Réservés

When Leather Face makes a reappearance at the trip, what will happen to all the teenagers, and who will survive?

description:

And treating me like some animal!

title: Lost in Darkness
description:
"Suddenly, I found our faces so close together, I could feel his warm breath caressing my face. It smelt slightly of mint, and an undercurrent that was all Cole-pure masculine goodness.I breathed in deeply, my eyes briefly fluttering closed. God, since when did he smell so good?"

Raven has lost everyone. Her mother and twin sister died, her father left, leaving her in alone in the world with powers that she barely understands. All that Raven has left is Cole, her best friend. 

When a dangerous enemy resurfaces intent on killing Raven, Cole swears he will do all he can to protect her. As the two get pushed closer together, will their combined powers be enough to save them? Will Raven be able to stop her heart from shattering to a thousand pieces?


***
Please keep in mind that this is a first draft, and is, for the most part, unedited. I know it's not at its best, but I'm working on it...

"Wow, I am so hooked!" 
"You captivated me from the start..." 
"The storyline seems very original..." 

The above were just a few of the comments I received... :)

As you can tell, this is also a romance as well as paranormal/fantasy :) hehe

title: Henry
description:
Could true love really be restricted between human and human, animal and animal? Agatha “Aggie” Pierce defies the socially acceptable. On an annual camping trip with her boyfriend Blake, brother Neil, and his wife Holly, Aggie is captured and dragged away by a larger-than-life primitive beast with distinctly large feet: a Bigfoot. Never in her life did Aggie think she would come face-to-face with such a creature having lived her life believing they were only myth. While Blake and Neil’s friends and family begin to find a way to recover Aggie from the depths of the woods and remove her from the danger of this unknown primitive animal, Aggie finds herself becoming attached to the sasquatch, and even gives him the name Henry. She sees that, despite all that has been said about Bigfoots, Henry is definitely not the stereotypical Bigfoot. He has life and an almost humanoid personality. Henry’s attraction to Aggie expands to the point where she is questioning his calm disposition… It could turn out that Agatha Pierce’s attempts to go against the socially acceptable come back to haunt her in the end…
(CC) Attribution - Pas de Modification
authorBio: 26. A woman looking to revive her passion for writing.

title: The Haunted Bhangarh Fort- Rajasthan, India
description:
(Undergoing heavy editing.)

You are on a tour to the most beautiful state of India- Rajasthan.
Pretty excited, you start the tour visiting many sites.
But what happens when you step into the Bhangarh Fort?

The Haunted Bhangarh Fort.
A historical site that is marked as one of the ten most Haunted places in India.

No one is allowed to step into that place before Sunrise and after Sunset, as an order by the Indian government.

This tragic and horrific story is about two youngsters. Nandini and Nikhil, who visit this fort as an adventure tour but end up getting caught in the clutches of an evil spirit.

Nandini's past somehow is linked to that of the Fort.
Read on and find out to know if Nandini can free herself and fight that evil force along with Nikhil.


Please see: This is not a real story.
Please please see: Prefer staying away if you're a grammar Nazi and are not capable of giving constructive criticism. The initial chapters were written with a rather immature narration. It improves as the story progresses. But STILL, if you want to read a better piece of this book, you can start, when it undergoes heavy editing. :)

title: Sharkgator
description:
People say that Westgate Lake was the best spot for trips, outings and vacations. 

It was.

But what they didn't know was the endangered specie that lived in the depth of the waters and....forest.

Who saw it didn't live to tell the tale, so no one knew and people go there all the time.

What was it?

Some may call it a shark. Some may call it an alligator. But if you ever get the chance to look at it before it rip you to shreds, you'll find out that it's a....

SHARKGATOR

=========================

Allison Guthrey's boss was putting on a trip for his employees. They have worked hard the previous years and deserved it.

Fourteen of them went, including Allison. Their boss had heard about Westgate Lake and decided it would be the best spot for their trip. It was quiet, peaceful, it had a wonderful river and a cabin to stop at. It was perfect. Exactly what they all needed.

What Allison, her boss and the rest of the staff didn't know was that, they were going to find more than pleasure and relaxation on this trip.

*~*~*~*~*
Amazing cover by @-Rinii-

title: Shadowbound
description:
Imagine being bound to your biggest nightmares and fears. Fourteen-year-old Randy Matheson realizes something strange has been following him for a long time, hiding in his very own shadow and dreams. At first, he thought he might've gone crazy; after all, aren't imaginary 'friends' only for little kids? But this is different. This shadowy figure seems determined to communicate with him.

What does it want from him? Why him? Only heaven knows how he hasn't gone insane-yet. Now, it's time for Randy to uncover the name of this being and its true intentions.

- - - - (First draft)

authorBio: I can't contain my excitement when it comes to sharing my spooky stories with others! Writing and reading about ghosts, monsters, and things that go bump in the night truly captivates me. The eerie atmosphere, suspenseful build-up, and unexpected twists in my stories are sure to send chills down your spine. I pour my heart and soul into crafting each tale, carefully choosing every word to create a sense of unease and anticipation for the reader. So please, do yourself a favor and immerse yourself in the world of my dark imagination. You won't be able to put them down! Dive into these mysterious worlds I've created and experience the thrill of being scared from the comfort of your own home. Trust me, you won't regret it!

title: The Vampires Pet
description:
Hallie is kidnapped and sold to a vampire as a pet. Basically she's his pet dog and food source all in one. Hallie hates him! He pets her and coo's at her. He feeds on her and takes away her innocence. When Sebastian loses someone very close to him he takes comfort in Hallie and the pair become closer. Hallie learns that even though he owns her, Sebastian is actually a kinda nice guy. So long as he gets fed and Hallie wears what he wants her to. He even promises to set her free... One day. But will he let her go? Or will Hallie forever be his pet?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Update- Although I do not post on here much anymore, I do often still write. I find it unfair to all of my fans that have to wait for updates, but please bare with me. When I'm silent, I'm working hard on whatever stories have caught my attention. When my story is almost finished, I will post five chapters of the story. If it takes off, Ill upload the completed book for fans to read without having to wait weeks / months for an update. 
Recently, I'm working on The Vampire's Mistress. I am currently working on a little 365 DNI some some - gangsters, yes please! The Italian Mob Boss. Also to finish this off I have a dragon romance coming with a kickass heroin that comes with pink hair and attitude! 
If anyone's a fan of Khal Drogo from the game of thrones, hit me up -  I have a romance based on that coming soon.  

Many people ask about the Vampires Pet, here's what I have to say, it started off as an idea unlike anything I ever saw on here all those years ago. As much as the book is loved, the entire thing needs a decade worth of overhaul, I'm thinking.... The plot is there, but as my writing has matured some, this book might benefit from a decent refresh and a little cup of swoon. 
Also, Billionaire Baby Deal is completed. I think it would give the book injustice to try and write a second one, HOWEVER, Diego and Alley's world doesn't end there, there's more billionaires in the sea and I have a work in progress within that world where the main character is a hired escort for our sexy billionaire just waiting to make some magic. 
Truly, after all these years, thank you for being my most loyal fans. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for falling in love with my characters and their happily ever afters. And thank you for keeping me on these wild, crazy adventures and thank you for helping my writing bloom!
Stay safe, and if you need a world to disappear into to get away from the real world for a time , have a look into my ever growing reading list and enjoy!

title: When Worlds Collide
description:
In the distant future, Earth lies in ruin, a desolate landscape scarred by the ravages of time and neglect. Cities crumble, forests fade to dust, and the remnants of civilization cling desperately to the shadows of a once-thriving world. Amidst this bleak panorama, a group known as the Treaders emerges-individuals bestowed with extraordinary abilities that connect them deeply to the earth and its truths.

With great abilities, Treaders can summon storms, grow life from barren soil, and even speak to the remnants of the past. Their gifts, however, come with a heavy burden: they are the last hope for restoring balance to a fractured planet, but they are also hunted by factions that crave their abilities for domination.

A girl, broken by captivity and lost in silent pleas may just hold the key to ridding the world of its desolation. 

A boy, forced to grow up too fast and see too much might just be the one able to save her. From the ones that hold her trapped...or from herself?

what will happen, When worlds Collide?




Trigger warning; depicted scenes of violence and abuse
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Hell's Personal Assassin: Book 1
description:
She just wanted a more interesting life.


That's it.


For her, the daily routine was simple:  wake up, school, study, sleep, repeat. 


Her life was absolutely plain to her, and she prayed for anyone out there to change it. 


But she should have more careful about what she wished for. 


Because all of a sudden the quiet girl that no one notices starts to... change.


Her hatred for everyone increases to the point where it's all she feels, her emotions start to wash away, her body becomes more powerful, and she starts getting more dangerous. 


That was her new beginning.


She's turned into a monster with no memory of who her human form was.


And she's not just any monster. 


She turns into Hell's personal assassin, a hunger for souls and a thirst for blood. 


But this is what she wanted, isn't it?


She asked for anyone out there to change her life, and make it more interesting. 


 And Satan decided to help her out with her request.

title: My Mute Mate
description:
I don't talk.
  
  As simple as that.
  
  Not a sentence. 
  
  Not a word. 
  
  Not a letter nor a sound.
  
  Not since that day, the day my life became a living hell.

title: Wolves of Entertainment
description:
~A Former Wattpad Featured Story~

After a night of drinks and fun at a bachelor party, Ricardo Gonzalez and six others find themselves stuck inside an abandoned hospital the morning after. Having little to no memory of the events from the previous night, he wakes up confused inside a locked room. A short moment later a voice from a radio emerges, informing him and the others of their current situation. On the wall is a list of rules written in red, and the rules talk of two wolves among the group.
 
The participants are being forced to play a sick variation of the party game called 'Mafia.' In order to survive, the rest must find out the identity of the two wolves and kill them before they do. Only one side may remain, and only death awaits the participants if the time limit is reached and there is no clear victor.

Will Ricardo have what it takes to survive this ordeal? If it comes down to it, will he have it in him to kill his own family?

- - -

[For those asking/assuming, this story has absolutely *nothing* to do with werewolves] This is my oldest work, and probably my worst one in terms of writing skill lol but please do enjoy it!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Deal with the Devil
description:
Every Halloween Ellie and her friends attempt to summon the devil, and this time it’s her turn, she had seen all of her friends do it before and he never appeared. She thought it was a stupid old tale, she didn’t believe in the supernatural, but he does exist and he’s coming for her, and it’s not just her soul he wants anymore.

title: Symbiosis~Daughter of Venom
description:
DISCLAIMER: THIS IS AN OC STORY!

After Eddie Brock had become the villain Venom, he knew society hated him because he was constantly after Spider-Man. Because who would side with a villain?  Your mother and father were murdered by the villain Carnage, another person who was overrun by a symbiote just like Venom. On his way home, Eddie walks past where you have been hiding out for the past several months after the death of your parents. He sees how you're struggling with trying to live on your own, which makes him sympathize with you since he had a rough time in his life. He takes you back to his apartment where he helps you recover and coupe with the loss of your parents. After a few months pass, you're out in the streets trying to find Carnage only to find a symbiote who's in need of a friend.

title: My Space Is An RV (我的空间是房车)
description:
In the dreams, an overwhelming fiery red bird descended from the sky, its burning wings igniting the familiar world around her.
Stiff and terrifying walking corpses surged from the ruins of buildings.
Yellow sandstorms filled the entire sky.
Heavy rain melted towering buildings, turning the cities into wastelands.
The fleeing people collapsed, coughing blood, on the red barren land...

...

Startled awake by another nightmare, Ji Ningxin woke up drenched in cold sweat and drove to the supermarket.
She realized their supplies at home weren't sufficient. She didn't want her older brother to be severely beaten for a bottle of clean water, nor did she want her father harmed because of a trap set around a box of medicine...
Whether the scenes in her dreams were real or not, she hoped to protect her family.

...

Fortunately, along with the apocalyptic dreams, there was also a pitch-black space.
Initially, she thought it was just a storage space. However, when she accidentally entered it, she discovered that this space was connected to her RV!?

[Passenger List], [Basic Defense], [Purified Water], [Automatic Blackwater Treatment], [Robust Structure], [360-Degree View], [Disinfection Zone]... As she stocked the space with more items, the performance of the RV became increasingly enhanced...

Collecting; metals (3/10 types), ore minerals (1/5 types), seeds (10/10 types)... it's upgradable.

Ji Ningxin started dismantling her home: tinfoil containing aluminum, ceramic tiles made of marble, cement in the walls containing lime and gypsum, glass containing quartz sand and borax, jewelry made of gold and silver, compasses with magnets, pencil leads containing graphite...
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Cathedral's Investigator
description:
After seeing her recently deceased husband, Mr. Michael Thompson, 25 years old, entering the chapel, Mrs. Alice G. Lauryn Thompson, a young widow in her 20s, comes across a priest, Mr. Augustus J. Williams, 50 years old, who tries to comfort her by telling the story of Edward Romano, 25 years old, a mysterious investigator who uncovers the truth through those who lost their lives. This haunting narrative explores the depths of sorrow and the quest for closure beyond the grave.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Filmmaker, screenwriter, writer - Hello everyone, my name is Edno Moreira, and welcome! Here is a bit of info about me. I was born in Brazil in the city of São Luís, Maranhão. I moved to the UK when I was only 12 years old; I grew up in the city of Bristol, England. I was fortunate enough to make it to university, film school, Cardiff, and now, after graduating, I'm still trying to fulfil my dream, which is bringing my stories to the screen. Thank you for your support.

title: New Beginnings: A Story in The Cthulhu Mythos
description:
With the help of modern technology, the unthinkable goal of the Cthulhu cult is closer than ever to being realized. As the remaining days before the opening of a cosmic portal that will unleash incomprehensible horrors on the world wane, Professor Henry Silberhutte and his team must find a way to stop them. But the revelation of a secret threatens the team. Will the Professor and John Steele, the team's strongest warrior, prevail against the Cthulhu chaos worshipers?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
AUTHOR BIO

Dr. Thomas Davison has taught college coursework inside two State Prisons in Ohio for the past eight years. His observations and interactions with his incarcerated students have deeply moved him. This motivated him to create poems and short stories about their daily lives and experiences. Thomas has recently started a not-for-profit Entrepreneur Services for Felons (ESF). He has dedicated 100% of his writing earnings to providing free one-on-one support services for felons and ex-felons. Dr. Davison has created two Writing Clubs within the prisons. These incarcerated students are his beta readers to ensure he speaks in their voice and keeps it honest.

His published novels include:

The Boy With Strange Eyes: award-winning YA Fantasy.

Different Prisons: NF-Memoirs, Dr. Davison's personal story about teaching inside the prisons. 

How to Write a Winning Dissertation:  Academic how to book.

title: Viscious 2: Cult of Kellan
description:
After narrowly escaping her deadly neighbor "Kellan", Alina destroyed her once charming cottage and set out yet again to start new. Starting over is never easy, especially not when you are as widely recognized and polarizing as Alina. Her unusual tale has inadvertently started a cult. A cult that wants to be her, a cult that wants to be Kellan. A cult that wants to find Kellan. How do you find a ghost killer, a man who remains untraceable? You have to have the right bait.
